Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.


Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.


Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?


Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.


Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.


Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: Utvecklare – Backend eller Fullstack
description:
**Om Parkster**
---------------


På Parkster vill vi vara bäst på det vi gör. Vi bygger smart och användarvänlig mjukvara, erbjuder en fantastisk kundservice och strävar efter att vara en riktigt bra arbetsgivare. Med kontor i Lund och München är vi verksamma i Sverige, Tyskland och Österrike. Idag finns vi på cirka 1400 orter och våra tjänster används av hundratusentals människor varje dag. Det hindrar oss inte från att ha ambitiösa tillväxtmål, snarare tvärtom. Tillsammans med kommuner, fastighetsägare och privata aktörer skapar Parkster parkeringslösningar som är smidiga idag och hållbara för framtiden.

**Om Utveckling**
-----------------


På utveckling är vi i skrivande stund 19 personer. Många har lång erfarenhet, men ingen har tappat lusten att lösa problem och lära sig nya saker tillsammans! Vi jobbar nära övriga avdelningar på företaget för att på riktigt förstå problemen vi jobbar med att leverera det som allra mest behövs.


Vårt arbetssätt fokuserar på att lösa större problem under flera veckor där du får ansvara för hur problemet ska lösas och ta ansvar för att föra ditt arbete framåt. Samtidigt är du inte ensam utan jobbar nästan alltid tillsammans med en kollega.

**Om rollen**
-------------


Vi söker nu flera utvecklare med några års erfarenhet. Vårt största behov ligger inom backend, men ibland är också frontend-behovet stort. Då vi ska anställa flera personer ser vi gärna att du antingen är inriktad på backend eller trivs i en fullstack-roll.


Vi utgår från kontoret i Lund och värdesätter verkligen gemenskapen på vår arbetsplats. Vill eller behöver man jobba hemma en till två dagar i veckan finns självklart den flexibiliteten, men vi tror att du värdesätter fysiska möten och småprat vid kaffemaskinen lika mycket som oss!

**Vem är du?**
--------------


För att lyckas i rollen tror vi att du är en person som:

* **Fokuserar på helheten.** Du trivs med att forma vägen mot målet snarare än att följa en färdig lista. Du bidrar med nya idéer, bygger för långsiktig stabilitet och ser till att det vi levererar är riktigt bra.
* **Tänker på värde kontra kostnad.** Vi vill bygga tekniska lösningar i toppklass, men vi är måna om att förstå kontexten och lägga vår tid där den skapar störst värde.
* **Har en stabil teknisk grund.** Vi har många och komplexa system, så för att kunna ta till dig dem behöver du ha bred kunskap och ha en vilja att förstå på riktigt.
* **Är nyfiken på att lära dig** - du delar med dig av din kunskap och söker feedback från dina kollegor för att bli ännu bättre.

**Det här jobbar vi med**
-------------------------


Vi lägger ingen prestige i att vara trogna ett visst språk för sakens skull, utan väljer verktyg efter problem. Idag ser vår vardag ut ungefär så här:

* **Backend**: Java och Kotlin med Spring Boot.
* **Frontend**: TypeScript, React och Next.js (vi har även Web components och en del legacy JSP).
* **Driftsplattform**: Kubernetes på Google Cloud (GCP).
* **Databaser**: Exempelvis BigQuery, MongoDB och MySQL.


Har du koll på den här stacken, eller är tillräckligt erfaren för att snabbt sätta dig in i den, kommer du att trivas hos oss!

**Vad vi erbjuder**
-------------------


Vi är ett gäng kollegor som drivs av att bygga mjukvara som gör skillnad. Idag är vi snart 100 medarbetare med en jämn fördelning mellan kvinnor och män som skrattar, lyckas och lär oss tillsammans.


Som internationellt tillväxtbolag erbjuder vi ett högt tempo där du får stort utrymme att växa. Här blir du en del av en framåtlutad organisation med korta beslutsvägar och en prestigelös kultur.


Parkster erbjuder bra villkor, inklusive tjänstepension, friskvårdsbidrag, privat sjukförsäkring och inte minst en arbetsplats där man har riktigt kul på jobbet.

**Låter det som något för dig?**
--------------------------------


Vi rekryterar löpande och ser fram emot att höra vem du är. Skicka med ditt CV och ett personligt brev där du berättar lite om vad du drivs av.

**Har du frågor?** Kontakta Sara Egli på sara.egli@parkster.com eller Fredrik Folkesson på fredrik.folkesson@parkster.com

title: Frontend Developer
description:
**Erfaren frontendutvecklare till KAN**
---------------------------------------


KAN är en av Sveriges största digitalbyråer. Vi hjälper lokala och globala varumärken att lyckas i en digital verklighet som hela tiden förändras. Vi kombinerar strategi, design, tech och content för att skapa digitala lösningar som gör skillnad.

  

Vi är ett prestigelöst och nyfiket gäng som värdesätter ambition, samarbete och innovation. Nu söker vi en erfaren frontendutvecklare till vårt kontor i Stockholm, som vill vara med och utveckla nästa generations webbupplevelser tillsammans med oss.

### **Om rollen**


Som frontendutvecklare på KAN blir du en viktig del av vårt Tech-team i Stockholm. I rollen:

* tar du välgrundade beslut kring frontendlösningar
* bidrar du till en hållbar frontendarkitektur
* säkerställer du kvalitet i implementation och leverans

  

Du jobbar tätt tillsammans med UX, designers, backendutvecklare, strateger och projektledare, från tidiga koncept till färdig lansering och vidareutveckling.


Vi söker dig som arbetat 5 år eller längre som webbutvecklare/frontendutvecklare och känner dig trygg i din kompetens. Du har goda kunskaper inom:

* HTML, CSS och JavaScript
* versionshantering med GIT
* releasehantering och deploy-flöden
* typografi, färg och form
* animation och interaktion
* tillgänglighetsanpassning
* responsiv layout, gärna i nära samarbete med designer och UX
* teknisk SEO (hygiennivå i allt du bygger)
* prestanda och pagespeed-optimering
* AI-verktyg (t.ex. Claude Code, GitHub Copilot) som stöd i utvecklingsarbetet
* CMS (vi jobbar bl.a. med Craft CMS, WordPress, HubSpot, Umbraco, Sitevision och Optimizely/Episerver)

  

Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av moderna frontendramverk, komponentbaserad arkitektur eller designsystem, men viktigast är att du har en stabil grund och är nyfiken på att utvecklas vidare.

##### **Som person är du:**

* strukturerad och noggrann
* van att jobba effektivt i projektform
* lösningsorienterad, självgående och bekväm med att ta egna initiativ
* bra på att samarbeta och kommunicera med både kollegor och kunder
### **Att jobba på KAN**


Du blir en del av vårt Stockholmskontor, med nära samarbete med teamet i Stockholm och möjlighet att ibland kroka arm med kollegor i Malmö när projekten kräver det.


Vi är en fullservicebyrå som tar kunderna från insikt och idé till digitala lösningar anpassade för olika plattformar och kanaler. Hos oss får du både vara med i det strategiska tänket och i det praktiska genomförandet.

### **Vi erbjuder dig**

* Ett stimulerande och utvecklande arbete på en av Sveriges största digitalbyråer.
* Konkurrenskraftig lön och förmåner (30 semesterdagar, friskvårdsbidrag etc.) samt trygghet genom kollektivavtal.
* Flexibilitet och möjlighet att påverka hur du lägger upp ditt arbete, inklusive möjlighet till distansarbete.
* En vardag med trevliga kollegor, schysst kultur och fokus på att ha roligt tillsammans, vi kallar det Working with friends.
* Kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling, vi ser lärande som en naturlig del av jobbet och delar regelbundet erfarenheter inom teamet och mellan kontoren.
### **Låter det intressant?**


Berätta om dig själv, dina erfarenheter och vad du vill göra härnäst. Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: Product Developer at Oatly
description:
WHY OATLY?


Across the world people’s consumption habits and diets are evolving to be more plant-based. Enter Oatly, the #1 oat based dairy alternative producer in the world with products spanning multiple categories. We’re determined to be part of the discussion on the long-term future of the food and beverage industry. To keep this movement going, we need more brilliant minds to come work with us to keep the momentum going and the Oatly flowing.


Our sole purpose as a company is to make it easy for people to turn what they eat and drink into personal moments of healthy joy without recklessly taxing the planet’s resources in the process.


Sustainability, nutritional health, and trust are at the heart of what we do. We are building a culture that constantly upgrades to each other so we can upgrade the planet. This is a company that shows great respect and a fearless approach to make positive changes. Does this feel exciting? Well, this is where you come in.


WHAT WE NEED YOU TO DO


Your mission is simple but impactful, develop new Oatly products that taste amazing, are good for people and the planet, and push plant-based food forward. You’ll help bring ideas to the shelf, working from early concepts all the way to the moment a customer says, “Wow, this is good.” And you’ll do it alongside an amazing, curious, and collaborative team.


More specifically, you will:

* Develop products that win hearts and help convert more people to plant-based.
* Drive and contribute to the creation of unique food products by exploring the how and why behind each development step.
* Perform and coordinate hands-on product development work.
* Present insights and findings clearly to colleagues across teams.
* Balance business needs with technical realities and work fast without compromising quality.
* Work in a structured, results-focused way, while staying flexible when surprises show up (they will).
* Support and improve our systems, processes, and ways of working.
* Jump into trials, tests, and analyses whenever needed.


WHAT WE NEED YOU TO BRING TO THE TABLE


To thrive in this role, we believe you have:

* An M.Sc. in food science/technology, food engineering, biotechnology, chemical engineering, agriculture, or a similar field.
* 2-4 years of product development experience in the food industry.
* Fluency in English.

Bonus points if you have:

* Hands-on experience working independently in a food lab.
* Knowledge of plant-based dairy or dairy technology.

We also imagine you’re curious, innovative, and structured. You enjoy working collaboratively but can drive things independently when needed. You love continuous learning, improvement, and balancing the big picture with important details. Most importantly, we hope you share our values and want to contribute to our mission of making the world a little better.


YOUR APPLICATION


Last day of application: 7th of April.


We treat all candidates equally. If you are interested, please apply through our application system; any correspondence should come from there. This will ensure that the candidate's experience is smooth and fair to everyone!


Love Oatly XOXO


#LI-TA1

title: Fullstack Developer - Digital sales
description:
* Application Deadline: March 29, 2026
* Kista
* Hybrid
**Job Description**
-------------------

*Build the digital journeys used by millions. Join Tele2’s Digital Product team and shape high-performing e-commerce experiences, end-to-end from sleek frontend interfaces to robust backend services with real impact on conversion, customer experience, and business growth.*


**B2C**  

This role is within B2C (Business to Consumer), one of Tele2’s key business units, responsible for our consumer brands Tele2 and Comviq. B2C covers a wide range of areas, including digitalization, commercial strategies, marketing, sales, customer service and advanced analytics. Guided by our brand promise, You are number 1. We are Tele2, we challenge industry conventions to create smarter solutions and better value for our customers. Working in B2C means putting the customer first and contributing to solutions that make more people choose Tele2 – again and again.


**About the job**
  

As a Fullstack Developer in Tele2’s Digital B2C unit, you will play a key role in evolving our digital sales and self-service platforms. Your primary focus will be on building and optimizing our online sales journeys, ensuring high performance, scalability, and seamless user experiences.



You’ll work in a cross-functional setup together with Product Managers, UX/UI designers, content specialists, and analysts, while collaborating closely with other development teams to ensure best practices and long-term scalability through robust architecture.


*You will:*


* Build and improve customer-facing e-commerce journeys with a strong focus on conversion and performance
* Develop modern frontend applications and integrate them with backend services
* Design APIs and services supporting digital sales flows
* Contribute to architectural decisions across frontend and backend
* Work with micro-frontend architecture and reusable design system components
* Collaborate cross-functionally from idea to production
* Ensure high quality through testing, monitoring, and continuous improvement
* Actively leverage LLMs in your day-to-day work to increase development efficiency and quality
* Help identify, prototype, and implement AI-driven solutions where they create real business and customer value


**Who are you?**  

*To thrive and succeed in this role we believe that you:*


* Have solid experience as a Fullstack Developer working across frontend and backend
* Are strong in TypeScript, React, and Node.js, with a good understanding of modern frontend architecture
* Have experience working with design systems and component-driven development
* Have experience building scalable backend services using Java and Spring Boot
* Are comfortable working in cross-functional product and development teams
* Have experience building and maintaining APIs and working with event-driven systems
* Understand performance, scalability, and maintainability in digital products



Preferred Qualifications:


* Experience with Micro-frontends and Astro
* Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud platforms (Azure)
* Familiarity with Apache Kafka or similar messaging systems
* Experience in large-scale digital commerce or customer platforms
* Familiarity with Vanilla Extract or similar styling approaches



You are a collaborative and solution-oriented developer who enjoys working close to the product and the business. You take ownership, are curious by nature, and continuously look for ways to improve both the product and how the team works. You’re comfortable navigating complexity and enjoy turning it into simple, scalable solutions.



**Great Place to Work**
-----------------------

* Pension and health care
* Hybrid and flexible work life balance
* Career opportunities
* Parental benefit
* Employee benefits and Tele2 discounts
* Inclusive workplace
**Skills & Requirements**
-------------------------

**A few words from the manager**


*Hello! I’m Gabriel, Head of Digital Product at Tele2. My mission is to build a high-performing team passionate about delivering exceptional customer experiences while driving real business impact. We work closely across product, UX, and engineering to continuously improve and challenge how digital sales should work. I focus on creating clarity in direction while giving the team ownership and room to grow. If you’re motivated by building great products, working with talented people, and seeing your work make a difference, I’d love to hear from you. //Gabriel Olofsson*


**Why Tele2**


* A culture of natural born challengers – At Tele2 we don’t just do things the traditional way. We challenge the status quo and push boundaries to create smarter and more valuable solutions for our customers. You will be part of a culture that values curiosity, initiative and collaboration, where new ideas are welcomed and everyone’s contribution matters.
* Inclusive and supportive environment – We believe in fostering a creative and flexible workplace where people can bring their whole selves to work. Diversity and inclusion are important to us, and we strive to create an environment where people feel welcome, respected and supported in growing both personally and professionally.
* A sustainability challenger – We are proud that Tele2 has been recognised as Europe’s Climate Leader by the Financial Times and named as Sweden’s most sustainable company by Time Magazine and Statista, reflecting our strong commitment to reduce emissions, transparency and long-term climate goals. Our efforts focus on three areas where we can make the biggest difference: advancing a circular economy, combating climate change, and protecting children online. By embedding these focus areas into how we operate and innovate, we aim to create positive impact for people, planet and profit.


**Interest and application**
  

Would you like to be a part of the Tele2s value-driven and including culture? Then hit the “apply now” button and let’s find out if we’re a match!



If you have any specific questions regarding the position, please feel free to contact TA specialist: angelica.ek@tele2.com



Please note that in compliance with personal data management regulations (GDPR), we are unable to accept CVs via email.
  

  

Warmly welcome to submit your application! To ensure an inclusive and fair recruitment process, we focus on your experiences and skills. Therefore, Tele2 has chosen not to consider cover letters. Instead, we kindly ask you to answer the screening questions included in the application form.


*As a step in the recruitment process, Tele2 performs a background check on final candidates.*


**Work with great people**
--------------------------

Emma
Digital Capabilities & Technology
*"Everyone at Tele2 always aim for the stars in order to create unlimited possibilities."*
Fanny
Systemspecialist Unified Communications
*"The work environment at Tele2 supports both personal and professional development, and there are significant opportunities for further career advancement"*
**About the company**
---------------------

At Tele2, we challenge the telecom industry to create more valuable solutions for our customers. Guided by our challenger mindset, we deliver high-quality connectivity and digital services, ranging from mobile and fixed networks to TV, streaming and global IoT.


Sustainability is an integral part of how we work. Tele2 has been recognized as a climate leader in Europe by the Financial Times and named Sweden’s most sustainable company, reflecting our long-term commitment to reducing our environmental impact and advancing circular solutions together with our customers.


Our values – Be Brave, Take Action, Make it Simple and Act Cost-efficiently – guide our culture, how we collaborate and how we turn ideas into action.  

  



  

Enable "functional cookies" to watch the video
company_description: We enable the transformation of businesses and the creation of tomorrow’s infrastructure. Connecting people and technology far and wide, as well as right here around us. Simple. Sustainable. Smart.

title: Senior Backend Developer
description:
### **Who we are?**


We Dibbers are passionate travel enthusiasts who want to make travel planning as easy as possible – a few clicks and you are ready to go! We have built a Swedish cutting-edge online platform to streamline and digitalize the travel experience for companies, individual travelers and wanderlust groups. We are an innovative team who moves the limits and who loves to celebrate success!


We are thrilled to announce an exciting opportunity for a talented **Senior Backend Developer** to join our team! Our passion for travel is what drives us, and we are looking for someone who shares that same enthusiasm. As our new **Senior Backend Developer** based in Stockholm, you will play a key role in architecting and developing our all-in-one platform. If you’re ready to join us on our quest to create a state-of-the-art platform and help people explore the world, let’s connect and discuss how you can make a difference.

### **What do we need?**

* You possess an exceptional knowledge of Java (Functional Java, Java Stream), Spring Boot, Microservices, CI/CD, PostgreSQL, and MySQL, with a preferred minimum of 5+ years of experience in these areas.
* Accountable, reliable, and able to hit the ground running with an enthusiastic and motivated attitude.
* Bonus points if you have experience with Maven, Mongo, AWS, event-driven architecture and developing Rest APIs.
* You should have a good understanding of the full development lifecycle and the Agile Software Development Life Cycle, with exposure to Scrum projects.
* Familiarity with Continuous Integration is a plus.
* Proficiency in object-oriented programming and software engineering principles is essential.
* Open-minded, analytical, and able to problem-solve creatively, in other words, a real-time player.
* Fluency in English (oral and written) is a must, with knowledge of other languages being an advantage.

### **What you’ll do:**

* Develop and maintain a high-quality code that adheres to coding standards, conventions and approved designs.
* Investigate and evaluate new and emerging technologies to maximize development efficiency and productivity.
* Co-architect the eco-system around the platform together with your teammates
* Collaborate with product managers, quality assurance representatives, and other developers to accurately estimate system issue resolution or package implementation efforts.
* Deploy and release new features and functionality in a timely manner.
* Create technical design specifications, participate in design reviews, and provide input to design recommendations.
* Conduct unit and integration testing of applications and troubleshoot and resolve any code-related issues or bugs.
* Write comprehensive code comments and debug code to ensure the highest quality of code.
* Ensure compliance with team or project processes and procedures.

### **What’s awesome about working at DIB?**

* Be part of a rapidly growing company with the opportunity to influence the development of our platform;
* Hybrid working policy.
* A nice and social office in a great central location.
* We prioritize your growth and development, offering training and education opportunities.
* It is not our goal to box you in, on the contrary, it is to allow you to grow and self-improve through our performance management process. We have a well-organized career path, according to your professional ambition within our company.

title: Backend Software Engineer (.Net Core)
description:
About Sinch
   

  


 Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 150,000 businesses-including Google, Uber, Paypal, Visa, Tinder, and many others-rely on Sinch's Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.
 



 Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey.
 



 At Sinch we
 **"Dream Big"** 
 ,
 **"Win Together"** 
 ,
 **"Keep it simple"** 
 , and
 **"Make it Happen"** 
 . These values are our foundation!
   

  




 Description
   

  


 At Sinch, we're on a mission to empower developers and businesses to build meaningful connections. As part of our Verification team, you will be a key part in enabling customers to securely connect and identify their users, preventing fraud and powering seamless interactions on a global scale.
 



 We're looking for a
 **Backend Software Engineer** 
 who is passionate about building the resilient, high-performance cloud infrastructure that powers millions of verification transactions. Our backend systems leverage the latest
 **C# and .NET Core technologies** 
 , deployed in
 **Kubernetes on AWS** 
 . If you have a passion for problem-solving, clean code, and modern DevOps practices, you will thrive in our culture of collaboration and innovation.
 



 As a core member of our agile team, you'll take ownership of developing and maintaining high-performing backend systems while tackling complex challenges at the intersection of distributed systems, cloud-native architecture, and real-time communication. You will:
 


* **Architect & Build:** 
 Design, develop, and scale the critical C#/.NET services that form the backbone of our Verification platform.
* **Own Your Services:** 
 Take full ownership of your code, from initial design and testing, to deployment on Kubernetes in AWS and ensuring its reliability in production.
* **Elevate Our Craft:** 
 Champion best practices in software architecture, code quality, and testing, helping to continuously improve our systems and processes.
* **Master the Cloud:** 
 Leverage the full power of AWS and Kubernetes to build observable, resilient, and automated systems that can handle a global user base.
* **Collaborate & Influence:** 
 Work in a tight-knit, cross-functional team of engineers and product managers to solve complex problems and drive the technical direction of our platform.


 Requirements
   

  


 You're a product-minded engineer who sees the big picture but also loves to dive into the details. You thrive on complexity and have a passion for understanding systems from the inside out, digging deep into the codebase to solve tricky problems and master the architecture. You're motivated by a challenge and take immense pride in the quality and reliability of your work.
 


* **Your Foundation:** 
 You have significant professional experience building and running production backend systems, with deep expertise in
 **C# and .NET Core** 
 .
* **Your Mindset:** 
 You possess a strong DevOps mentality, are comfortable with CI/CD pipelines, and believe that the best code is clean, testable, and maintainable.
* **Your Approach:** 
 You are a natural collaborator with excellent communication skills, eager to share your knowledge and learn from others.


 Nice to Have
   

  

* Hands-on work with
 **Kubernetes and AWS** 
 in a production environment.
* Building and scaling distributed, service-oriented architectures.
* Databases like
 **MySQL** 
 or
 **Redis** 
 .
* Experience in mobile client development (SDK).


 Our Hiring Process
   

  


 We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel.
 



 We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn't what you're looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page. No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us!

title: Full Stack Developer
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.
   

  

**Jobbeskrivning**
* Utveckla och underhålla webbaserade applikationer med fokus end to end lösningar
* Samarbeta nära UX/UI-designers för att skapa användarvänliga och tillgängliga lösningar
* Arbeta enligt agila metoder och testdriven utveckling
* Bidra med problemlösning och idéer
* Stötta webbperspektivet i större verksamhetsprojekt
* Dokumentera tekniska lösningar och processer
* Säkerställa kodkvalitet genom enhetstester och automatiserade tester
* Arbeta med secure software development i enlighet med legala ramverk för IT- och informationssäkerhet


**Din profil (Skall krav)**
* Relevant eftergymnasial utbildning
* Talar och skriver svenska flytande
* Minst 4 - 5 års erfarenhet av webbutveckling


**Teknisk kompetens**
* C#, JavaScript, TypeScript, .NET, CSS
* Angular ver 17->
* Azure DevOps och molnlösningar
* Rest, JSON, XML
* CSS-ramverk som Tailwind eller Bootstrap
* CMS-erfarenhet, gärna EpiServer/Optimizely
* Oauth och Open Identity
* Visual Studio, Postman
* Testdriven utveckling och automatiserade tester


**Meriterande erfarenheter**
* Docker
* SQL och databaser
* Redis eller andra cachelösningar
* Webbanalysverktyg som Google Analytics eller Piwik PRO


**Sista ansökningdatum:** 
 24-03-2026
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.
   

  

 🌟 En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.
   

  

 🌴 Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?
   

  

 🏥 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.
   

  

 📚 Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.
   

  

 🕑 Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?
   

  

* Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.

title: Backend developer
description:
**About Froda**
 Froda was founded in 2015 with a clear vision – to revolutionize the banking experience for entrepreneurs by making it easy and affordable to invest in their ideas. Today, we are one of Sweden's fastest-growing fintech companies with large international growth plans. We are a creative tech company with the ambition to turn a historically expensive and unfair industry into something ethical and sustainable by promoting entrepreneurship.
   

  

 Our mission to revolutionize the banking experience for entrepreneurs is not only reflected in our products but also in our workplace. By fostering a culture of respect, collaboration, and continuous learning, we provide opportunities for personal growth and professional development. Join us in transforming the banking industry and be a part of our journey to empower entrepreneurs.
   

  

**About The Role**
 To further develop and scale our tech platform, enabling us to continue improving the banking experience for entrepreneurs, we are expanding our tech department. As a Backend Developer at Froda, you will be part of a cross-functional team working in one of our product areas — either developing features for our partners, improving our credit systems or maintaining our loan and payments core. For each team, the idea is to continuously deliver customer value as well as to improve the technical structure to make sure our systems are stable and healthy. Together with your team, you will design, build, and deliver scalable and maintainable solutions that directly impact our customers.
   

  

 You will get a unique chance to be a part of a scaling fintech company with strong momentum and a stable foundation, backed by a banking license as a quality stamp.
   

  

**Who are you?**
 We believe that you are an experienced and curious developer who thrives in collaborative environments and is passionate about building scalable solutions with real impact. You enjoy working closely with other skilled and open-minded professionals and actively contribute to knowledge sharing and continuous improvement. You are a pragmatic problem solver who communicates clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders. You are fluent in both English and Swedish.
   

  

 We believe that you have experience of:
   

  

* At least 4 years in a similar role, ideally within product-focused teams
* Programming in C#/.NET with a solid understanding of modern software design principles
* Working with SQL and NoSQL databases in production environments
* Cloud platforms such as Azure (or other major providers)
* Agile methodologies and best practices in software engineering, including testing, CI/CD, and DevOps mindset
* Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, RabbitMQ, and microservices architecture is a strong plus


**What’s in it for you?**
 At Froda, you’ll be part of a company that combines the best of both worlds – a fast-moving, high-energy culture with the stability and structure to support long-term success. We’re 100+ ambitious self-starters who genuinely care for each other and the work we do, all while having fun together.
   

  

 Here, you’ll have the opportunity to take ownership of your work, develop your skills, and shape your own growth journey. With big ambitions and a rapidly evolving business, there’s plenty of room to grow, lead initiatives, and make a real impact on both our company and the industry. If you're looking to be part of a success story and contribute to something bigger, this is the place for you.
   

  

 Furthermore, you’ll get:
   

  

* An opportunity to be part of an exciting journey, shaping the future of our company and transforming the SME financing landscape
* Fabulous office overlooking Stockholm and a friendly culture that values work/life balance
* We prioritize working in the office to maximize the positive impact of in-person collaboration, but we offer flexibility with work hours and remote work
* Competitive compensation package
* Insurance and pension plan


 This role is all about building the tech that powers funding for thousands of entrepreneurs —if you're excited by our mission, apply or tell a friend!

title: Frontend Engineer
description:
****About Intric****
 At Intric, our mission is to make generative AI easy, open, and secure — so that more organizations can benefit from its full potential.
   

  

 Our collaborative web platform is already trusted within the Swedish public sector and by organizations where data sovereignty and security are essential. We are now entering a pivotal growth phase and expanding across Europe.
   

  

 This is an opportunity to join early, take ownership, and help shape the future of secure AI infrastructure.
   

  

****About the Role****
 As a Frontend Engineer, you will lead the development of a fast, accessible, and scalable web experience. You will build new features, refine architecture, and continuously improve performance and usability with the end user in focus.
   

  

 You will collaborate closely with backend engineers, product designers, and business stakeholders to evolve the platform across both desktop and mobile. This role combines hands-on coding with architectural thinking and product impact.
   

  

****What You’ll Do****
* Develop and maintain high-quality, scalable frontend features
* Improve performance, accessibility, and overall user experience
* Contribute to architectural decisions and frontend best practices
* Collaborate cross-functionally with product and engineering teams
* Optimize state management, caching, and data flows
* Continuously improve developer workflows and tooling


****Our Tech Stack****
* Node.js
* TypeScript
* HTML / CSS
* Svelte / SvelteKit
* Tailwind CSS
* Docker
* Git
* Jira


****Who You Are****
 You care deeply about building reliable, maintainable, and user-friendly products.
   

  

 You:
   

  

* Have 3–5+ years of frontend engineering experience
* Have a strong understanding of core web technologies (HTML/DOM, HTTP, JavaScript/TypeScript)
* Have experience building and scaling modern web applications
* Are comfortable working with state management and caching strategies
* Write efficient, accessible, and maintainable code
* Collaborate effectively and communicate clearly across teams
* Have a degree in Computer Science or equivalent practical experience


****Must-Haves****
* Solid experience with modern JavaScript frameworks
* Strong understanding of frontend architecture and performance optimization
* Experience working in product-focused, collaborative environments
* Ability to take ownership of features from idea to production
* Professional fluency in English


****Bonus****
* Experience with Svelte or SvelteKit
* Experience with Tailwind CSS
* Familiarity with developer tooling and internal workflow optimization


****Why Join Intric****
* Build technology with real societal impact
* Join at a pivotal growth stage and influence both product and technical direction
* Work in a trust-based, flexible environment with high ownership
* Be part of a fast-moving team that values pragmatic decisions over rigid frameworks
* Shape the frontend foundation of a secure AI platform scaling across Europe


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary and stock options
* 25 days of paid vacation
* Wellness allowance
* Rapid career development in a fast-growing AI company


****Culture at Intric****
 At Intric, we build secure AI solutions for organizations that cannot afford to get it wrong. We operate in environments where quality, responsibility, and long-term trust are essential.
   

  

 We value ownership and high standards. You are expected to take initiative, think critically, and contribute beyond your immediate scope when needed. Collaboration is key, but so is independent execution.
   

  

 We move fast, but we prioritize doing things properly. As we expand across Europe, every team member plays a role in shaping both the product and the culture.

title: Back End Developer
description:
We are looking for a Backend Engineer for Stealth Startup in agentic analytics/financial modelling.
 



  





 As a developer with us, you will take end-to-end ownership of our critical backend services—from API design and database orchestration to scaling our cloud infrastructure and building reliable CI/CD pipelines.
 



  





**About the team** 




 We are a newly founded, pre-seed startup established by three former Klarna alumni, and you will join as one of our very first hires. We are based in a coworking space at Spårvagnshallarna in Stockholm.
 



  





**About you** 




 To succeed in this role, you need:
 


* 2+ years of experience from a big tech company, ideally working with data platform products.
* Solid backend engineering experience using Node.js and TypeScript.
* Experience with platform engineering, DevOps, CI/CD, and Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).
* To be comfortable navigating the strict security requirements associated with financial data.
* To be excited about building, scaling, and optimizing complex backend systems in an early-stage startup environment.



  





 Experience with GCP, Python, Databricks, or any of the databases in our stack (Neo4j, Firestore, Delta Lake) is a strong plus, but not a strict requirement.

title: Senior Java Software Engineer
description:
**Senior Java Developer | Stockholm | SaaS | Fleet Management & Logistics** 




  





 Our client, is an innovative SaaS company focused on transforming fleet management for logistics, transportation, and delivery sectors. Their platform leverages data-driven insights, real-time analytics, and AI-powered routing to help businesses optimise fleet operations, reduce costs, and improve delivery efficiency. As the need for efficient, eco-friendly logistics grows, our product offers meaningful solutions to real industry challenges.
 



  





 Their mission is to make fleet management simpler, smarter, and more sustainable. They're seeking a Senior Java Developer to join the team in Stockholm and play a key role in building a highly scalable and adaptable platform, delivering next-generation solutions for fleet challenges across the globe.
 



  





**Position Summary** 




 Looking for an experienced Senior Java Developer to design, develop, and implement critical components of our platform. You’ll ensure it’s scalable, secure, and high-performing, collaborating with a team of engineers, data scientists, and product managers. If you’re passionate about Java, cloud technologies, and solving real-world problems, I’d love to talk with you!
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* **Development:** 
 Lead the backend development of services and APIs in Java, powering our core platform functionality.
* **Architecture:** 
 Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design and deploy a scalable and resilient SaaS platform.
* **Best Practices:** 
 Implement coding best practices, conduct code reviews, and mentor junior developers.
* **Optimisation:** 
 Continuously enhance performance, reliability, and scalability of the platform.
* **Innovation:** 
 Contribute to cutting-edge solutions in real-time data processing, predictive analytics, and AI-driven fleet management.
* **Team Collaboration:** 
 Work closely with product and design teams to understand requirements and deliver features that delight our customers.



  





**Requirements** 



* **Experience:** 
 5+ years of Java development experience, ideally within SaaS or cloud-based environments.
* **Languages** 
 : Swedish and English Fluency.
* **Technical Skills:** 
 Proficiency in Java, Spring/Spring Boot, RESTful APIs, and microservices architecture.
* **Database Management:** 
 Experience with SQL and NoSQL databases (e.g., PostgreSQL, MongoDB).
* **Cloud & Containers:** 
 Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).
* **Problem-Solver:** 
 Strong problem-solving skills to address complex, real-world challenges through efficient code.
* **Collaboration:** 
 Excellent communication skills and experience working in agile, cross-functional teams.
* **Bonus Skills:** 
 Knowledge of AI/ML or data analytics, experience in logistics/transportation, and familiarity with CI/CD pipelines.



  





**What is Offered** 



* **Meaningful Work:** 
 Be part of a SaaS product that directly contributes to more sustainable, efficient logistics and helps solve real-world challenges.
* **Growth Opportunities:** 
 Access to continuous learning, development programs, and career advancement in a supportive and forward-thinking environment.
* **Positive Culture:** 
 Join a collaborative, inclusive, and vibrant workplace in the heart of Stockholm, with regular team events and a culture of innovation.
* **Flexible Working:** 
 Hybrid work options and flexible hours to support work-life balance and your preferred work style.
* **Generous Benefits:** 
 Competitive salary, health benefits, pension plans, and a wellness allowance to support your well-being.
* **Tech Perks:** 
 The latest hardware, access to leading development tools, and a tech-forward workplace to keep your skills sharp and up-to-date.
* **Time to Recharge:** 
 Generous vacation policy and paid time off so you can relax and recharge.



  





 If interested, please apply or email your up to date CV and contact details to mar@thor-companies.com

title: Fullstack Django or Python
description:
At Svea Solar, we have a clear vision - to fix the planet. As Sweden’s and one of Europe’s leading players in energy technology, we are driving the energy transition with solar power and smart energy solutions. ⚡
   

  

 We’re now expanding our website team with an
 **Fullstack Engineer** 
 . Are you ready to join the Power Shift?
   

  

**About The Role & The Team**
 As our
 **Fullstack Engineer** 
 in the Website team, you’ll be part of a talented and ambitious agile team. Together you’ll design and implement technical solutions for Svea Solar’s website and related areas.
   

  

 You’ll work closely with a Teach lead, a frontend engineer, an analyst, and a product manager, reporting to our Engineering Manager Anna. We follow a collaboration-first approach, working three days a week from our Stockholm office.
   

  

 As a Fullstack Developer, you’ll have real impact on a key part of our business—our website drives leads and sales. By building tools that increase sales, you’ll also amplify our positive impact, helping Svea Solar move closer to our mission of ridding the planet of fossil fuels—all while growing your skills in a friendly, collaborative culture.
   

  

**Your key responsibilities:**
* Build and maintain both frontend and backend features
* Develop modern, accessible, and semantically correct websites
* Write clean, maintainable, and well-structured code
* Design and implement REST APIs and integrations with our CMS written in Python.
* Collaborate with designers, product managers, and fellow engineers to create functional and user-friendly solutions.
* Contribute to architectural discussions and best practices, supporting long-term scalability and event-driven design.


 Are we a match?
   

  

**We’re Looking For You Who…**
* Value team success over personal success and thrive in a collaborative dynamic environment.
* Have at least 5 years of professional experience in software development, including at least 2 years in backend.
* Have strong experience with: Python, REST APIs, and event-driven design.
* Are fluent in English and/or Swedish.


**Bonus points if you..**
* Are comfortable with Django or Wagtail.
* TypeScript, React, Node.js, Express,
* Have worked with one or several CMS and have experience of SEO
* Have solid knowledge of HTML5, CSS3, and SASS.


 🌍 Life as a Power Shifter - What do we offer you
   

  

**The opportunity to make an impact** 
 – your work directly contributes to fixing the planet and driving the energy transition.
   

  

**About**
**A value-driven workplace** 
 – read more about our values here.
   

  

**The chance to own your results** 
 – grow, take responsibility, and power up as both we and the energy industry evolve.
   

  

**Diversity and inclusivity** 
 – different perspectives drive innovation. Here, you can be yourself and contribute with your experiences, identities, and ideas.
   

  

**Employment benefits** 
 – occupational pension, 30 days of vacation, wellness allowance, parking, and more.
   

  

**Flexibility/ hybrid work** 
 – work up to two days a week from home.
   

  

 Want to see what life at Svea Solar really looks like? Follow us on Instagram: @LifeAtSveaSolar
   

  

 ⚡Who are we
   

  

 As Sweden’s - and one of Europe’s - leading providers of energy tech and solar, we help our customers optimize their energy use with smart, connected solutions. From solar panels to heat pumps, batteries, EV chargers, and software, we’re shaping the future of energy. We call it
 **The Power Shift** 
 . And the ones driving it?
 **Power Shifters** 
 .
   

  

  

  

**About Our Recruitment Process**
* With structured interviews and assessments through Alva Labs, we make sure our recruitment process is fair, inclusive, and unbiased - because diversity is key to innovation!
* Read more about our Recruitment process here.


 👉
 **Ready to become a Power Shifter?** 
 We review applications on a rolling basis, so don’t wait to send yours in!

title: Embedded Software Developer
description:
Scania's R&D department is transforming to become part of TRATON Group R&D. TRATON is a group of strong brands with a shared mission: transforming transportation together to create the future of sustainable transport solutions. Within TRATON, we include MAN, Scania, Volkswagen Truck & Bus, and International. As part of a global team of industry experts, you get to think bigger, experience more, and reach further. Together, we have the power to transform transportation.
   

  

**Would you like to develop global software solutions used across all TRATON brands, working close to both customers and advanced technology? Join us and shape the future of propulsion control systems.**
**Role Summary**
 In this role, you will solve complex physical and hardware-related challenges by developing advanced software that delivers a powerful, smooth, and robust powertrain, while also ensuring long hardware lifetime and reliability.
   

  

 Our work involves extensive vehicle testing, and your ideas will be developed through short, iterative development cycles. We foster a culture that encourages innovation, creativity, and thinking beyond conventional solutions.
   

  

 Safety is a key part of our responsibility. We work extensively with functional safety concepts for different driving scenarios — both with and without a driver — in accordance with ISO 26262. You will also contribute by formulating clear, testable requirements that meet both regulatory demands and customer expectations.
   

  

**About The Team**
 We develop embedded software for TRATON-developed gearboxes and actuators within the propulsion domain. We are now looking for a new team member to strengthen our work with gear change control.
   

  

 We are a team that collaborates closely to deliver high quality, reliable products together. We take pride in challenging what seems impossible and turning complex problems into clear, solvable tasks.
   

  

 You will join a supportive environment where coaching, team development, and personal growth are part of our everyday work. We believe that everyone should have the opportunity to develop their skills, contribute with their strengths, and influence the solutions we build.
   

  

**Your Profile**
 Must have
   

  

  

* A degree in engineering, with a background in software, mechatronics, or electrical systems development
* Several years of experience in embedded systems, preferably within the automotive industry
* Strong knowledge of MATLAB/Simulink and C and/or Python
* A valid European category B driver’s license, as vehicle testing is a continuous part of the role


 Nice to have
   

  

  

* Experience working with ISO 26262 or similar certification processes
* Experience in requirements specification for embedded systems
* Knowledge of or experience with TRATON powertrain development


**What We Offer**
 We offer a dynamic, flexible workplace with hybrid work options, including Scania Sergel and Midway hubs. With a structured development plan and courses, TRATON Group R&D supports your career growth both locally and internationally.
   

  

 Benefits include wellness allowance, TRATON result bonus, flexible hours, and company car leasing. We also host events for employees and their families, and Stockholm residents enjoy direct access to Södertälje via Scania Job express buses.
   

  

**Application**
 Your application should include a CV and any relevant certificates. We welcome all applicants and strive for diversity in our recruitment processes.
   

  

 Apply as soon as possible, no later than 2026-03-10. Screening will take place on an ongoing basis during the application period. Background check may be required for this role.
   

  

 If you have questions or would like more information, please contact: Karin Avatare , Recruiting Manager Karin.avatare@scania.com , TGRAMFT – Unit Transmission Control Functions
   

  

 Motion Control
   

  

 We look forward to your application!

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**Senior fullstack-utvecklare till Symetri Tech** 




  





 Nu har du chansen att få vara med och utveckla framtidens applikationer som hjälper våra över 400 000 slutanvändare inom industri och bygg att effektivisera sina arbetsflöden och jobba smartare.
 



  





 Vi söker en senior fullstack-utvecklare med fokus på backend till vårt Common Services team på Symetri Tech med placering i Stockholm. Älskar du att röra dig mellan olika tekniska miljöer och hålla ihop helheten i komplexa system? Trivs du med att kombinera kodhantverk, arkitektur och många kontaktytor? Vill du vara en bärande del i utvecklingen av Symetri Techs gemensamma mjukvaruplattform? Då kan det här vara rollen för dig!
 



  





**Om tjänsten** 




 Du blir del av ett engagerat team av utvecklare och tekniska experter på Symetri Tech. I detta team kombineras djup teknisk kompetens med ett långsiktigt perspektiv. Arbetet handlar inte om enskilda projekt, utan om att bygga stabila, återanvändbara och framtidssäkra lösningar som andra team kan lita på. Här får du möjlighet att påverka arkitektur, tekniska val och riktning – i en miljö där kvalitet, samarbete och tekniskt ledarskap står i centrum.
 



  





**Din roll** 




 Som senior fullstack‑utvecklare blir du en av nyckelpersonerna som håller samman plattformen och ser till att den utvecklas i rätt riktning. Rollen innebär att du arbetar nära både applikation och backend, och smidigt växlar mellan olika språk, miljöer och delar av stacken beroende på vad uppgiften kräver.
 



  





 En viktig del av din vardag är samarbetet med övriga organisationen. Du har täta dialoger med produktägare, utvecklingsteam och tekniska specialister från flera delar av Symetri Tech för att förstå behov, fånga idéer och omsätta dem till tydliga, genomförbara lösningar. Du bidrar till att driva nya initiativ, utforska nya arbetssätt och etablera struktur och riktlinjer inom Symetri Tech.
 



 I rollen utvecklar du kod med fokus på stabila, robusta och återanvändbara komponenter som används av flera produktteam. Med din tekniska bredd och förmåga att se helheten skapar du momentum, tar initiativ vidare och säkerställer att det landar på bästa sätt i teamet och inom Symetri Tech.
 



  





**Din profil** 




 Vi söker dig som trivs med att kombinera mycket kodande med att vara del av en sammanhållande profil i en större tech-stack. Ditt go-to språk är C# men fördelaktigt kan du vara lite ”language agnostic” och har inga problem att hjälpa andra team. Du uppskattar att vara med i en växande organisation där du får påverka struktur, teknik och riktning när plattformen växer.
 



  





**För att lyckas i din roll** 



* Fördjupad kunskap om C# och .NET ekosystemet (inklusive modernt .NET samt äldre .NET Framework) med flera års erfarenhet
* Erfarenhet av både backend och desktop-/applikationsutveckling
* Goda kunskaper om mjukvarudesignmönster och arkitektur
* Goda kunskaper i Git och god förståelse för versionskontroll arbetsflöden
* Goda kunskaper om ASP.NET Core designmönster och best practice
* Goda kunskaper i att konstruera och designa ett modernt webb-API
* Kunskap om relationsdatabasdesign och användning av Entity Framework-designkoncept och best practice
* Kunskaper i att skriva tester och testbar kod



  






 Utbildning
 



* Kandidatexamen eller motsvarande kombination av utbildning och erfarenhet.



  





 Vi är ett internationellt företag så det är viktigt att du behärskar både svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.
 



  





**Detaljer** 




 Vi söker företrädesvis en person till Stockholm och startdatum är omgående eller efter överenskommelse.
 



  





**Din ansökan** 




 Vi arbetar med löpande urval så skicka din ansökan snarast möjligt.
 



  





 Har du kompletterande frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta Mattias Lanzén, Team Manager Common Services, på +46 8 732 27 92 eller Lars Vrennhage, HR Operations, på +46 8 704 80 39.
 



  





**Om oss** 




 På Symetri hjälper vi innovativa företag inom bygg och tillverkningsindustri med att optimera arbetsprocesser, förenkla informationshantering och förbättra projektkvalitén. Vi utvecklar och distribuerar våra egna lösningar och är en av världens främsta återförsäljare av Autodesk mjukvara med över 400 000 användare i norra Europa och USA. Vårt uppdrag är att utmana människor att arbeta smartare för en bättre framtid och vi värdesätter passion, lagarbete, mod och viljan att driva förändring över allt annat. Symetri med över 1.000 medarbetare är en del av Addnode Group som är börsnoterat på Nasdaq Stockholm.

title: Python Developer
description:
We are looking for senior Python Developer with AWS.
 





  
 





 Job Responsibilities
 





 \* Develop, and maintain backend services using AWS Serverless architecture.
 





 \* Implement solutions using Python, following best practices for performance, scalability, and reliability.
 





 \* Work with various AWS storage and database services to build robust data-driven applications.
 





 \* Troubleshoot, optimize, and enhance backend systems to ensure high availability and performance.
 





 \* Contribute to CI/CD automation and improve deployment workflows.
 





  
 





 Technical Skills & Qualifications
 





  
 





 \* Strong experience with AWS Serverless services (Lambda, Step Functions, API Gateway).
 





 \* Proficient in Python for backend development.
 





 \* Hands-on experience with AWS databases and storage (PostgreSQL or SQL).
 





 \* Good understanding of even drive architecture.
 





 \* Hands-on experience with AWS services (SQS, Event Bridge pipes, SNS)
 





 \* Good knowledge of IAC tools like (Terraform or Amazon CDK)
 





 \* Good understanding of Git for version control.
 





 \* Experience with CI/CD pipelines, preferably GitLab CI/CD.
 





  
 





 Additional Attributes
 





  
 





 \* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
 





 \* Good communication and collaboration abilities.
 





 \* Passion for building scalable, secure, and high-quality backend systems.
 





 \* Ability to work independently as well as in team settings.
 



* \* Experience in event driven architecture and DDD (domain driven design)

title: Software Engineer, Marketplace
description:
**Introducing evroc**
 At evroc, we are building a secure, sovereign, and sustainable hyperscale cloud to reimagine the digital future of Europe. By joining our company, you have an exciting opportunity to contribute to the development of next-generation cloud services. We are seeking intellectually curious and highly motivated team members who are ready to embrace the thrilling challenge of building the first European owned hyperscale cloud.
   

  

**Location:** 
 Stockholm
   

  

**Job type:** 
 Permanent position
   

  

**Join the Pioneers**
 We’re looking for a Software Engineer to help build evroc’s Marketplace, the platform that enables third-party providers to integrate, distribute, and operate services directly within evroc’s cloud. Think of it as the foundation of an app-store ecosystem for cloud infrastructure, built with security, scalability, and European sovereignty at its core.
   

  

 This is a greenfield opportunity where you’ll work on the core control plane, APIs, and extension models that power the Marketplace. You’ll play a key role in shaping how integrations are built, secured, operated, and scaled across evroc’s cloud services.
   

  

**What You’ll Tackle**
* Design and build control-plane services in Golang for provisioning, lifecycle management, and access control.
* Define and evolve internal and external API contracts with a strong focus on versioning and backward compatibility.
* Build secure and extensible integration and plugin models for third-party services.
* Collaborate with product, platform, and billing teams on usage tracking, licensing, and monetization flows.
* Architect multitenant systems with strong isolation, quotas, rate-limiting, and fine-grained authorization.
* Work closely with evroc’s platform and infrastructure teams to ensure seamless integration across evroc’s cloud services.
* Contribute to high engineering standards around code quality, documentation, observability, and operability.
* Design and build new Marketplace functionality from scratch, from early architecture decisions to production-ready services.
* Work with evroc partners to define Marketplace requirements.


**Skills We Value**
* Strong production experience with Golang.
* Deep understanding of API design, control-plane architectures, and service-oriented systems.
* Experience working with cloud platforms and cloud-native architectures.
* Solid background in multitenancy, authentication/authorization, and secure system design.
* Experience designing modular, extensible systems and integration frameworks.
* Strong understanding of distributed systems, including databases, caching, and messaging.
* Experience with Kubernetes and infrastructure tooling is a plus.
* Experience with marketplaces, billing, or usage-based systems is a plus.


**Why Join evroc?**
 We offer a competitive salary and an equity package to attract the best. Whether it’s the cosmopolitan allure of London, the vibrant Stockholm, or the Mediterranean charm of Sophia Antipolis, you’re poised for an inspiring work environment and a captivating local culture!
   

  

 At evroc, diversity is our strength. We champion an inclusive environment where every background - ethnicity, age, gender identity, beliefs, and culture - is celebrated.
   

  

 Applicants must possess a valid work permit.

title: Senior AI Efficiency Architect & Evangelist
description:
**Description**
*Position at LeoVegas Group*
**About The Role**
 We are looking for an extroverted individual who will be the leading voice and technical consultant, accelerating the adoption and effective application of AI/ML tools and practices across every stage of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) within all LeoVegas development teams. The main focus of the role is on AI strategy, cross-team adoption, training and technical leadership.
   

  

 This is a high-impact, high-autonomy role for someone who combines deep technical expertise with outstanding communication skills and thrives in front of diverse technical audiences.
   

  

**Your Mission**
 Drive the effective and responsible adoption of AI/ML tools across every stage of the SDLC - from design and coding to testing, CI/CD, and release management.
   

  

 You will work hands-on with engineering teams, translate AI potential into practical workflows, and ensure AI usage delivers measurable improvements in speed, quality, and developer experience.
   

  

**YOU WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR:**
* Global AI Evangelism & Workshops: Regularly travel to and embed within various development teams (on-site or remote) to conduct hands-on workshops, lead design sessions, and provide tailored technical guidance on leveraging AI for efficiency. Demonstrate real-world use cases and practical AI integration patterns.
* Technical Consulting & Strategy: Act as the principal technical consultant for development teams seeking to integrate AI tools (e.g., code generation, testing, analysis, documentation) into their workflows.
* Decisive Leadership & Autonomy: Possess the technical acumen and confidence to make independent, high-impact decisions regarding AI tool selection, integration patterns, and best practices.
* Feedback Loop & Internal Product Management: Gather direct, qualitative feedback from development teams to inform the Engineering Efficiency team's roadmap and prioritize internal AI tooling needs.
* Documentation & Training: Create high-quality, engaging, and accessible documentation, tutorials, and training materials to lower the barrier to entry for AI tool adoption across the organization.


**OUR SUCCESSFUL CANDIDATE WILL HAVE THE FOLLOWING:**
**Essential Skills**
* Deep technical expertise: proven background in software engineering, with significant experience in applying AI/ML concepts to practical SDLC problems (e.g., LLMOps, prompt engineering, integrating code assistants, static analysis).
* Exceptional communication skills that allow clear articulation and comfort presenting complex technical concepts to both executive and engineer-level audiences.
* Influence & leadership: ability to lead without direct authority, driving change and adoption through influence, trust, and demonstrating clear technical value.
* Autonomy: proven ability to manage a wide scope of responsibilities, prioritize a travel/consulting schedule, and operate with significant independence.
* SDLC Mastery: comprehensive understanding of modern SDLC practices (CI/CD, DevOps, testing methodologies, release management) in a large-scale enterprise environment.


 NICE TO HAVES
   

  

* Previous experience with Java and Java-related technologies


**Who We Are**
 At the core of LeoVegas Group is Team Leo. Our culture is our foundation and is what enables us to innovate, build, and lead as we trailblaze our way through the igaming industry. We’re a team of over 1400 innovators, initiators, and groundbreakers working in a fast-paced and agile environment across 11 offices worldwide.
   

  

**Benefits**
* Hybrid work policy (3 days a week in the office)
* 4 weeks of Workation (T&C apply)
* 30 annual vacation days
* Occupational Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness contribution annually
* Parental Leave Top-Up
* Possibility to enroll in a private health care insurance for both you and your partner
* 1,500 SEK equipment allowance
* Benify - benefits portal with many offers and discounts


**JOIN US!**
 In our pride, we empower our teammates to find their roar and run with their wildest ideas. We don’t wait for things to happen; we pounce and make it happen!
   

  

 Would you be a good fit for the Leo Pride - give us a roar!
   

  

 \*\*As our company working language is English, we’d like to see your CV in English, please\*\*

title: Senior Business Developer
description:
**⚡️ What We Do**
 Flower is Flexible Power. We are a next-gen energy company leveraging AI and machine learning to make renewable energy stable and always available – even when the sun isn’t shining and the wind isn’t blowing.
   

  

 Through smart optimization and trading of energy assets like wind and solar farms, battery systems, and EV chargers, we make renewable energy reliable and predictable, leading the charge towards the energy system of tomorrow.
   

  

**🌟Who We Are**
 Tech company at heart. Purpose-driven at core. Flower consists of a diverse group of innovative individuals with a strong desire to improve the state of the world.
   

  

 At Flower, we believe trust, collaboration and diversity are essential to not only create an inclusive work environment, but also drive career growth. By embracing varying perspectives, we allow creativity and progress to flourish.
   

  

 To accelerate towards our goal of becoming the pioneering force powering the energy system of tomorrow, we are now looking for a passionate and skilled Senior Business Developer.
   

  

**👩‍💻 About The Role**
 You will play a key commercial role in scaling Flower’s Distributed Assets business by leading partnerships across retailers, BRPs, OEMs, and other asset-enabling partners within the flexibility market. You will drive the full commercial process from initial outreach to signed agreements, while shaping how partners adopt and integrate Flower’s flexibility offering. This role combines strategic influence with hands-on execution and is central to unlocking partner-driven capacity growth required for Flower’s long-term success.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Lead commercial engagements with retailers, BRPs, OEMs, and other asset-enabling partners within the flexibility market.
* Manage the full lifecycle from first contact to signed partnership agreement
* Build and maintain a high-quality commercial pipeline
* Influence partner decision-makers and strategic direction
* Identify and develop new business opportunities that strengthen the Distributed Assets portfolio
* Collaborate closely with internal teams (Product, Tech, Partner Success, Trading) to ensure smooth onboarding and long-term success
* Represent Flower externally and position our flexibility offering in the market


**Who You Are**
* An experienced commercial professional with 8+ years in business development, partnerships, or B2B sales
* Relevant academic background, such as a degree in engineering, economics, business, or a related field.
* Skilled in managing complex stakeholder landscapes and long commercial cycles
* Able to translate strategic goals into concrete commercial actions
* Confident engaging with senior decision-makers on both strategic and operational topics
* Experience in the energy sector, utilities, or related industries is a strong advantage
* Fluent in both Swedish and English, with strong written and verbal communication skills.


**📍 Location**
 Our beautiful office is located in the heart of Södermalm just a short walk from Slussen subway station. We encourage in-office collaboration but support a hybrid work model.
   

  

**✉️ Apply**
 Our corporate language is English, as we have over 30 nationalities in the office. We therefore appreciate it if you could submit your CV in English.
   

  

 We look forward to hearing from you!
   

  

*We kindly but firmly decline any engagement in recruitment assistance for our hiring processes. This includes partnership offers or the sale of recruitment tools.*

title: Embedded Software Engineer
description:
The role of the embedded software engineer is to design, develop and maintain the software for our optical communication systems, and contribute to the continuous improvement work of the R&D team.
 



  





**Introduction** 




 Smartoptics provides innovative optical networking solutions for a new era of open networking. We focus on solving network challenges and increasing the competitiveness of our customers. Our customer base includes cable and telecom operators, cloud providers, Internet exchanges, governments and thousands of enterprises.
 



  





 The candidate will be part of the R&D team, developing complete systems including both hardware and software.
 



  





**Position summary** 




 For our Stockholm office, we are looking for a senior C++ developer. You will be designing features and applications for embedded systems in our range of fiber optical communication products. Your primary responsibility will be to design and develop these applications, and to coordinate with the rest of the team working on different layers of the infrastructure. We are working agile according to the SAFe methodology, in teams of 5-8 people consisting of software and hardware developers, system testers and Scrum masters. Some possibility for work from home, but most days we try to meet in our office in Kista, Stockholm.
 



  





**Requirements:** 



* Based in the Stockholm area
* Office-first policy
* University degree in relevant field, e.g. MSc in Electrical Engineering or Computer Science
* Good communication skills in English, preferably also in Swedish
* Strong proficiency in Modern C++, with fair knowledge of the language specification and 3+ years of experience of hardware related C++ development
* Thorough knowledge of the standard library, containers, and algorithms
* Good understanding of memory management in non-garbage collected environments
* Understanding of hardware and embedded system design, Embedded Linux and Yocto



  





**Desired skills:** 



* Experience in the telecoms sector and knowledge of optical transceivers
* Experience with network technologies (IP, Ethernet, DWDM)
* Experience with SDN (software-defined network) architectures and related protocols (e.g. RESTCONF, NETCONF and gNMI)
* Strong teamwork and communication skills
* Good problem-solving skills
* Good troubleshooting and debugging skills
* Knowledge of agile development



  





  





 Smartoptics R&D team is located in Kista with head office in Oslo, Norway. Benefits include pension, health insurance, bonus scheme, 6 weeks’ vacation and flexible working hours. For more information about Smartoptics, please see
 
 smartoptics.com/about
 
 .
 



  





 Furthermore, note that you must have a Swedish/EU work permit. No relocation assistance or visa support provided. No recruiters or agencies, please.
 



  





**About Smartoptics** 




 Smartoptics is a Scandinavian company founded in 2006. We provide innovative optical networking solutions for the new era of open networking. Our focus is on solving network challenges and enhancing the competitiveness of our customers. Our clientele includes cable and telecom operators, cloud providers, Internet exchanges, governments, and thousands of enterprises.
 



  





 At Smartoptics, we value inclusivity and prioritize the well-being of our employees. We foster a positive company culture and provide a supportive work environment.

title: Product Developer
description:
**För kunds räkning – Product Developer till företag inom DVH** 




  





 Vill du arbeta i en miljö där inköp, produktutveckling och affärsansvar möts? Vi söker nu en Product Developer till ett konsumentvarubolag med stark global närvaro inom dagligvaruhandeln. Rollen innebär ett helhetsansvar för att utveckla produkter och kategorier med fokus på lönsamhet, kvalitet och hållbar utveckling.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Som Product Developer ansvarar du för att driva och utveckla produkter och kategorier genom inköpsarbete, marknadsinsikt och produktutveckling. Rollen innebär ett kommersiellt ansvar där du följer lönsamhetsutvecklingen inom dina kategorier, förhandlar priser och villkor samt identifierar förbättringsmöjligheter i sortiment, förpackning och sourcing. Du arbetar nära producenter och interna funktioner för att säkerställa konkurrenskraftiga produkter och en långsiktigt hållbar affär.
 



 Tjänsten är placerad på huvudkontoret i Stockholm och rapporterar till CMO. Rollen kommer att ha ett nära samarbete med funktioner inom försäljning, marknad, logistik, kvalitet och ekonomi.
 



  





**Ansvarsområden** 




 Rollen omfattar ansvar inom flera områden, framför allt inköp och leverantörssamarbete, produktutveckling, analys och lönsamhet samt hållbarhet och kvalitet. Det innebär att du bland annat ansvarar för:
 



  





***Inköp och leverantörssamarbete***



* Daglig kontakt och regelbundna möten med producenter
* Förpackningsutveckling
* Identifiera nya producenter vid behov för att säkerställa att hela tiden behålla en ledande position
* Avtal och förhandling för ansvarig kategori
* Lageravstämningar och uppföljning tillsammans med producenter



  





***Produkt- och kategoriutveckling***



* Identifiera och värdera utveckling av befintliga samt potentiella nya produkter och kategorier med fokus på R&D inom hållbarhet och miljö
* Utbilda interna och externa partners i produkter samt ta fram underlag tillsammans med Quality & Regulatory Manager
* Definiera produktmål och krav baserat på konsumentinsikter, exempelvis förpackningslösningar, ursprung och konsumentbehov
* Koordinera produkt- och designutveckling tillsammans med producenter, designer och marknadsfunktion



  





***Analys och lönsamhet***



* Ansvara för uppföljning av råvarupriser, prisförhandlingar och prisjusteringar i dialog med leverantörer samt säkerställa korrekt prisinformation internt
* Arbeta med produktkalkylering, prissättning och lönsamhetsanalys per producent och kategori
* Hantera offerter och följa marknadsutveckling genom omvärldsbevakning, exempelvis via mässor, butiksbesök och konkurrensanalys
* Säkerställa korrekt artikeldata och affärsinformation



  





***Hållbarhet och kvalitet***



* Arbeta med hållbara lösningar genom sourcing och produktutveckling
* Säkerställa att produkter uppfyller krav kring kvalitet, certifieringar och regelverk i samarbete med den interna kvalitetsfunktionen



  





**Profil** 




 Vi söker dig som har ett analytiskt och affärsorienterat arbetssätt och trivs i en roll där inköp, analys och produktutveckling möts. Du arbetar strukturerat och har förmåga att driva flera parallella processer samtidigt. Du är kommunikativ och trygg i dialoger som kräver argumentation och förhandling. Samtidigt har du ett pragmatiskt arbetssätt, eget driv och förmåga att ta initiativ i arbetet. Rollen innebär många kontaktytor vilket kräver god samarbetsförmåga och förmåga att bygga relationer både internt och externt.
 



  





 Vi ser gärna att du har:
 


* Cirka 3–5 års erfarenhet från produktutveckling, inköp eller kategoriarbete
* Erfarenhet av leverantörsdialog och prisförhandling
* Erfarenhet från konsumentvaror, FMCG eller dagligvaruhandel
* God analytisk förmåga och vana att arbeta med kalkyler och affärsanalys
* Erfarenhet av att koordinera eller driva utvecklingsprojekt
* Flytande i engelska i både tal och skrift, svenska är meriterande
* Akademisk utbildning inom ekonomi eller motsvarande eftergymnasial utbildning



  





**Hur du ansöker till tjänsten** 




 Företaget samarbetar i detta uppdrag med Academic Search. Du ansöker via knappen ”Ansök nu” nedan, där du fyller i dina uppgifter och bifogar personligt brev och CV. All information hanteras konfidentiellt i enlighet med gällande Academic Searchs integritetspolicy och personuppgiftslagen GDPR. Det innebär att vi endast kan hantera din ansökan på detta sätt. Tack för att du förstår.
 



  





 Har du frågor om tjänsten, vänligen kontakta ansvarig konsult: Joachim Marmstedt på joachim.marmstedt@academicsearch.se eller på mobil 0768 502 732 eller ansvarig researcher: Amelia Kämpeberg, amelia.kampeberg@academicsearch.se eller på mobil 0736 503 157
 



  





 Ansök redan idag. Intervjuer kommer att ske löpande.

title: Veeva Commercial Cloud Manager
description:
**Company Description**
***Statistics show that women and underrepresented groups tend to apply to jobs only if they meet 100% of the qualifications. Sobi encourages you to change that statistic and apply. Rarely do candidates meet 100% of the qualifications. We look forward to your application!***
 At Sobi, the work we do every day redefines the standards of care and transform the lives of people living with rare diseases.
   

  

 As a diverse team of entrepreneurial people, we are passionate about our growth journey towards becoming a global leader, making a difference for rare disease patients, moving quickly and always challenging the status quo.
   

  

 We are committed to an inclusive, sustainable and flexible workplace that fosters growth and development.
   

  

**Job Description**
**About the role**
 To support our global Commercial and Medical organizations, we are looking for an experienced Veeva Commercial Cloud Manager to develop and enhance our Veeva Vault CRM platform within a fast growing, highly regulated pharmaceutical environment.
   

  

 Our IS/IT is managed in-house and acts as a strategic enabler for implementing, developing, and supporting business-critical systems across the organization. In this role, you will be responsible for solutions that support our global Commercial and Medical teams, working in close collaboration with stakeholders across affiliates, headquarters functions, and external partners.
   

  

 This is a hands-on, global role combining system administration, configuration, solution design, and platform evolution within the Veeva Commercial Cloud ecosystem.
   

  

 The position is part of a European team, with flexibility for remote work within the European time zone, reporting to the Head of Digital Commercial based in Stockholm.
   

  

**Your impact will include**
* Act as the global System Administrator for the Veeva Vault CRM platform
* Configure and evolve core Vault CRM modules (e.g. Account Management, Call Reporting, CLM, Events Management, Campaign Manager, Approved Email, Surveys, Medical Inquiry, Cycle Plans, Event Meetings)
* Translate complex business needs into scalable, compliant system solutions
* Manage roles, permissions, security, and data governance
* Provide operational support, troubleshooting, and user enablement
