All of our roles include Restricted Stock Units (RSUs), giving every team member ownership in Grafana Labs' success. We believe in shared outcomes—RSUs help us stay aligned and invested as we scale globally.*


* *Compensation ranges are country specific. If you are applying for this role from a different location than listed above, your recruiter will discuss your specific market’s defined pay range & benefits at the beginning of the process.*


**Why You’ll Thrive at Grafana Labs:**


* **100% Remote, Global Culture -** As a remote-only company, we bring together talent from around the world, united by a culture of collaboration and shared purpose.
* **Scaling Organization** – Tackle meaningful work in a high-growth, ever-evolving environment.
* **Transparent Communication** – Expect open decision-making and regular company-wide updates.
* **Innovation-Driven** – Autonomy and support to ship great work and try new things.
* **Open Source Roots** – Built on community-driven values that shape how we work.
* **Empowered Teams** – High trust, low ego culture that values outcomes over optics.
* **Career Growth Pathways** – Defined opportunities to grow and develop your career.
* **Approachable Leadership** – Transparent execs who are involved, visible, and human.
* **Passionate People** – Join a team of smart, supportive folks who care deeply about what they do.
* **In-Person onboarding** - We want you to thrive from day 1 with your fellow new ‘Grafanistas’ to learn all about what we do and how we do it.
* **Balance is Key** - We operate a global annual leave policy of 30 days per annum. 3 days of your annual leave entitlement are reserved for Grafana Shutdown Days to allow the team to really disconnect. *\*We will comply with local legislation where applicable.*


**Equal Opportunity Employer:** We will recruit, train, compensate and promote regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, disability, age, veteran status, and all the other fascinating characteristics that make us different and unique. We believe that equality and diversity builds a strong organization and we’re working hard to make sure that’s the foundation of our organization as we grow.


*Grafana Labs may utilize AI tools in its recruitment process to assist in matching information provided in CVs to job postings. The recruitment team will continue to review inbound CVs manually to identify alignment with current openings.*



#LI-Remote



*For information about how your personal data is used once you’ve applied to a job, check out our* *privacy policy**.*
company_description: Grafana Labs is the company behind Grafana, the leading open source software for visualizing time series data.

title: Product Owner & Team lead - Embedded Systems
description:
About Munters
  
At Munters, we are on a mission to shape a more sustainable world through innovative climate solutions. As we continue our digital transformation, we are looking for a Product Owner & Team Lead for Embedded Systems to join our team in Kista.
  
This role combines the responsibilities of a Product Owner—driving embedded product development with a user-centric and platform-aligned approach—with team leadership responsibilities. You will lead a team of embedded system developers, support collaboration with other teams and stakeholders, and play a key role in team development, performance, and motivation.
  
This is an excellent opportunity for someone who thrives on combining strategic product ownership with hands-on leadership of a technical team.
  
Key Responsibilities
  
  

**As Product Owner:**  

Own and prioritize the backlog, translating product vision and roadmap into user stories and tasks.
  
Collaborate with Product Managers and Technical Product Managers to deliver high-quality features aligned with customer needs and technical feasibility.
  
Foster a collaborative team environment with hardware and software developers, UX/UI designers, Scrum Master, and stakeholders.
  
Prioritize embedded systems and platform improvements that directly impact product features or control system capabilities.
  
Handle and prioritize support cases escalated from the global service team, ensuring timely resolution and clear communication.
  
Act as the main point of contact for production regarding embedded control systems, configuration tools, and end-of-line testing.
  
Collaborate with the Scrum Master and technical team to define user stories and ensure timely delivery with expected quality standards.
  
Validate features and user needs using feedback loops, testing, and analytics.
  
  

**As Team Lead:**  

Lead and support the team day-to-day, providing coaching, support, and regular development dialogues.
  
Foster a high-performing, psychologically safe, and collaborative team culture.
  
Provide feedback and guidance on performance and development needs in coordination with the line manager.
  
Support resource planning, recruitment, and onboarding.
  
Act as a cultural role model, promoting cross-team alignment and driving change during organizational transformation.
  
  

Requirements
  
Proven experience as a Product Owner or similar role in embedded or control systems.
  
Prior leadership experience or clear potential for formal people leadership.
  
Strong understanding of agile methodologies, preferably Scrum.
  
Deep understanding of embedded systems and integration into product development.
  
Familiarity with C/C++ and embedded development practices.
  
Hands-on experience with Azure DevOps or Jira for backlog and sprint management.
  
Experience handling technical support cases and collaborating with technical teams.
  
Analytical skills with focus on technical product development and customer needs.
  
Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.
  
Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, or related field preferred.
  
  

Soft Skills
  
Strong communication and collaboration across hardware, software, and business teams.
  
Ability to listen to feedback and adjust product direction accordingly.
  
Ability to inspire, motivate, and lead a team through challenges and disagreements.
  
Skilled at balancing short-term delivery and long-term goals.
  
Ability to make informed decisions on feature prioritization based on business needs, user value, and technical resources.
  
Contribute to a positive work environment where team members feel supported and motivated.
  
Lead with stability and clarity even when all facts are not available.
  
  

What We Offer
  
A strategic role combining product ownership and technical team leadership.
  
An international and collaborative work environment.
  
Competitive salary and benefits package.
  
Opportunities for personal and professional development.

title: Product Owner within Clinical Decision Support (eHealth)
description:
Cambio is one of the Nordics' leading suppliers in e-health with a comprehensive offering for the entire health and care chain. Our e-health solutions supports health care professionals in their daily work and offer patients safer and more easily accessible care. We are proud to be an important part of Swedish healthcare. We are growing continuously and now have about 1000 employees in several countries.
  
What is Clinical Decision Support? CDS is an area of health information technologies that combines evidence-based knowledge and different kinds of patient data in order to generate and present helpful information to clinicians as care is being delivered. We develop standards-based, EHR-independent Clinical Decision Support (CDS) applications that aim to accelerate the learning and innovations of healthcare. At Cambio CDS, we are all passionate about improving healthcare by developing software tools to facilitate clinical decision-making at point of care. After initial success in Sweden and other countries, we anticipate a steady growth of the operation in the coming years.
  
The position
  
Are you passionate about healthcare? Do you want to contribute to the lives of millions? If your answers to both are true, the Cambio CDS team is the right place for you.
  
We are looking for product owners to help us reach new heights. Your main responsibilities include the following:
  
  

Author and maintain functional requirements, risk analysis and end user facing documentation of our CDS apps.
  
  

Conduct user interviews, design workshops with clinicians as part of UX design of the CDS apps, in physical setting or remotely.
  
  

Participate in post-market surveillance and usability studies.
  
  

Lead and participate in CDS app UX design, clinical modelling, testing and releasing of CDS apps.
  
  

Perform demonstration of CDS apps with potential customers.
  
  

Provide training of CDS apps towards our customer representatives or partners.
  
  

Help the development of authoring tools and improve our app development process
  
  

About you
  
As a person, you are a humble and responsible team player who loves problem solving. You pay attention to details and follow things through. You are open-minded, curious and keen to learn new skills. Like us, you are passionate about improving healthcare and motivated by the potentials of health IT.
  
At Cambio, we value initiative and personal growth. Our culture is built on Trust, Care, and Together—values we believe are important to both our work and our people. It’s important to us that you recognize and identify with these values.
  
Requirements 
  
  

Medical doctor degree or similar
  
  

Excellent writing and oral skills in both English and Swedish
  
  

Proven record in team-based product development
  
  

It's a bonus if you have
  
  

Working experience in Swedish/Nordic healthcare systems
  
  

Experience with UX or usability studies
  
  

Clinical oncology background
  
  

Experience with machine learning, natural language processing and generativeAI tools in product development
  
  

**Place of employment:** Stockholm
  
**Scope:** Full-time, hybrid work model (three days per week in-office)
  
**Form of employment:** Permanent employment, 6 months trial period
  
**Additional Information:** The role involves access to sensitive information, therefore a background check will be conducted on the final candidate.
  
We review applications and conduct interviews on a rolling basis, so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible via the link.
  
We look forward to receiving your application!
  
CAMBIO- FOR A HEALTHIER TOMORROW
  
Welcome to a company where healthcare is improved every day. Here you will work with leading technology in a collaborative, trusting and empowering environment where your contribution will be appreciated and celebrated. In our caring culture you will have the opportunity to pursue different paths of professional growth. Seize the opportunity to do the most important work of your life. Read more about us here!
  
A healthier tomorrow also means taking care of those who make it possible -explore our employee benefits
  
Learn more about our recruitment process here
  
Are you interested in Cambio but you don’t feel that this position is the perfect match? Check out our other open positions at our career site.

title: Product Manager - Permits
description:
**We’ve signed up to an ambitious journey. Join us!**

*As Arrive, we guide customers and communities towards brighter futures and more livable cities, it isn’t a challenge just anyone could take on. Luckily, we have something to help us make it happen. Our people and our values. We Arrive Curious, Focused and Together. Just as our entire brand is inspired by the North Star, the shining light leading travelers to their destinations since time began, our values guide us. They help us be at our best. For our customers. For the cities and communities we serve. For ourselves. As a global team, we are transforming urban mobility. Let’s grow better, together.*

**The Role**


Parking permits might sound like a niche problem — but at the scale we operate, it's anything but. Millions of drivers rely on digital permits to access residential zones, university campuses, office lots, and city-managed spaces every day. And the operators running those programs? They need tools that just work.


As PM for Parking Permits, you'll own the product that sits at the heart of this: the platform operators use to set up, issue, and manage permit programs — and the experience drivers go through to apply and stay compliant. It's a genuinely multi-sided challenge, with real regulatory weight, a diverse set of operator needs, and a direct impact on how people navigate their cities.


This is a role for someone who likes getting deep into a problem space, building trust with operators, and shipping things that actually makes a difference.

**How to make an impact**

* Take full ownership of the operator permit platform — how permits are configured, issued, renewed, and monitored. You're the one steering this.
* Get close to operators. Understand their workflows, their constraints, their frustrations — and turn that into a product roadmap that solves real problems.
* Run discovery, drive delivery, track outcomes. You own the full loop.
* Define the metrics that matter and hold yourself accountable to them.
* Work fluidly across engineering, design, analytics, sales, and CS — you'll need all of them to ship well.
* Make smart trade-offs. Operator needs, driver experience, regulatory requirements, and technical feasibility don't always point in the same direction — and that's where you earn your keep.
* Use AI tools to move faster and think smarter — we expect everyone on the team to actively experiment with what's out there.

**About you - Your background**

* You've got 3–5 years in product management, ideally working on tools that serve businesses rather than just consumers — B2B, operator platforms, or anything where the end user has real operational stakes.
* World-class product and design taste. You know the difference between something that works and something that's well-crafted — and you hold the bar high.
* Shameless curiosity. You question assumptions, push on requirements, and ask the uncomfortable "why" before you start building.
* Extreme speed and clarity. You make decisions fast, communicate precisely, and don't let ambiguity become an excuse to slow down.
* Comfort with complexity. You bring structure to messy problems without needing a perfectly scoped brief to get moving.
* Attention to what matters. A confusing configuration step can cost an operator hours — you sweat the details that have real consequences.


Bonus points if you've worked anywhere near parking, mobility, or municipal tech — but **the right mindset matters more than the domain.**

**Why you'll love this role**

* **It's a real ownership role.** Permits touch operators, drivers, enforcement, and city infrastructure — you're not owning a feature, you're owning a product that has a life of its own.
* **The problem space is genuinely interesting.** Regulatory complexity, multi-market expansion, B2B tooling, and consumer UX — all in one role.
* **You'll see your work in the wild.** Every permit issued, renewed, or enforced runs through what you build. The feedback loop is real.
* **The team is small and the mandate is big.** No bureaucracy, no waiting for someone else to make the call — just high trust and high impact.
* **You're joining a platform that moves cities.** Arrive operates in 90+ countries and 20,000 cities. The scale of what you ship here is hard to find elsewhere.

title: Product Manager (Senior) Stockholm
description:
### **Om uppdraget**

Du kliver in som Senior Product Manager i ett globalt digitalt produktteam med ansvar för att utveckla och förbättra OMNI-kundresan. Fokus ligger på att koppla ihop digitala och fysiska kanaler till en enhetlig och inspirerande kundupplevelse.


Du arbetar nära design, utveckling, analys och verksamhet för att identifiera behov, prioritera initiativ och leverera affärsvärde.

### **Dina arbetsuppgifter ️**

* Leda discovery, leverans och iteration av produktinitiativ
* Identifiera kundbehov och omsätta dessa till tydliga problemformuleringar
* Ta fram och prioritera backlog samt produktkrav
* Driva samarbete med UX, utveckling och analytics från idé till release
* Säkerställa att lösningar möter både kund- och affärsmål
* Arbeta datadrivet med insikter och förbättringar

### **Förväntade leveranser**

* Prioriterad och affärsdriven produktbacklog
* Tydliga kravställningar och problemdefinitioner
* Lanserade och validerade produktinitiativ
* Mätbara förbättringar i kundupplevelse (digitalt och i butik)
* Etablerade KPI:er och uppföljning av produktens effekt

### **Din profil**

**Obligatoriska kompetenser:**

* Minst 5–7 års erfarenhet som Product Manager i digital miljö
* Erfarenhet av OMNI / cross-channel kundresor
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att driva produktutveckling end-to-end
* Stark förmåga att prioritera utifrån affärsvärde och kundnytta
* Erfarenhet av agila arbetssätt

**Meriterande färdigheter:**

* Erfarenhet från retail eller liknande kundnära verksamhet
* Vana att arbeta datadrivet (kvantitativt + kvalitativt)
* Erfarenhet av experimentering/A-B-testning

### **Personliga egenskaper**

* Affärsdriven och resultatorienterad
* Stark kommunikativ förmåga
* Självständig och ansvarstagande
* Bekväm i komplexa och föränderliga miljöer
* Nyfiken och lösningsorienterad

### **Plats, omfattning och period**

**Plats**: Stockholm  

**Distans**: ca 25%  

**Omfattning**: Heltid  

**Period**: 19 mars 2026 – 30 november 2026  

**Sista ansökningsdag**: 19 mars 2026


Sway Sourcing är en innovativ rekryteringspartner som specialiserar sig på att matcha rätt talang med rätt företag – snabbt och effektivt. Vårt huvudfokus ligger inom Ekonomi, Administration, HR, Marknad och IT, men vi har även den breda expertis och flexibilitet som krävs för att leverera skräddarsydda rekryteringslösningar inom alla branscher.


Trots att vi är en relativt ny aktör har vi redan byggt förtroende hos många av Sveriges största företag och arbetar både nationellt och internationellt. Med baser i Sverige och Spanien erbjuder vi en unik kombination av lokal expertis och global räckvidd. Vårt starka nätverk och djupa branschinsikter gör oss till en självklar partner för företag som vill ligga steget före i sin rekrytering.

title: UX/UI Designer
description:
**About Justera Group**  

Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.  

  

**About the Role:**


We are seeking a highly skilled Senior Product UX Designer to lead the design of customer-centered experiences for a global mobile application across iOS and Android platforms. This role focuses on creating intuitive, engaging, and inspiring digital journeys that enhance the overall customer experience.


Working closely with cross-functional teams, you will transform customer needs and business goals into elegant, user-friendly solutions. From discovery through delivery, you will ensure high-quality UX outcomes while contributing to a strong and consistent design practice.  

**Project Scope**


This assignment focuses on enhancing the upper funnel e-commerce experience, specifically within home furnishing accessories. The goal is to optimize browsing and discovery journeys, making product exploration seamless, intuitive, and inspiring.


You will:

* Lead the design of browsing and discovery flows
* Apply established e-commerce UX patterns and best practices
* Use data-driven insights and A/B testing to inform decisions
* Collaborate with other designers to ensure alignment and consistency
* Work both independently and within cross-functional agile teams

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Design and deliver end-to-end UX solutions for mobile applications (iOS & Android)
* Create clear user flows, wireframes, prototypes, and interaction patterns
* Define information architecture to support intuitive navigation
* Conduct and incorporate usability testing and user feedback
* Collaborate with product managers, developers, and stakeholders
* Balance user needs, business objectives, and technical constraints
* Contribute to continuous improvement of design standards and processes

**Requirements:**

* Proven experience in UX/Product Design, with a strong focus on mobile apps and e-commerce
* Deep understanding of user-centered design principles and accessibility
* Experience working in agile, cross-functional teams
* Ability to work independently while maintaining strong collaboration

**What We Offer:**

* A dynamic and innovative workplace driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: UX Designer
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.
   

  

**Din profil (Skall krav)**
* Mycket senior inom UX och service design i komplexa organisationer (processintensiva verksamheter, många intressenter).
* Dokumenterad förmåga att gå från osäkerhet till tydlig riktning genom discovery, analys och facilitering.
* Stark kommunikatör och ledare som kan navigera låg designmognad och skapa momentum utan att skapa motstånd.
* Van att samarbeta nära arkitekter, projektledning, programledning och BA och översätta mellan teknik, process och användarbehov.
* Flytande svenska i tal och skrift.


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av inköp/sortiment, supply chain eller andra planerings- och beslutssystem.
* Erfarenhet av upphandling/kravställning där designunderlag påverkar scope och kravkvalitet.
* Praktisk erfarenhet av AI-assisterade användarflöden (t.ex. beslutsstöd, rekommendationer, generativt stöd) med fokus på tillit och kontroll.


**Sista ansökningdatum:** 
 20-03-2026
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.
   

  

 🌟 En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.
   

  

 🌴 Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?
   

  

 🏥 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.
   

  

 📚 Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.
   

  

 🕑 Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?
   

  

* Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.

title: Product Designer - AI Partnerships
description:
We design Spotify’s consumer experience—end to end, moment to moment, across every screen, platform, and partner integration. Our mission is to make listening feel effortless, personal, and joyful for users around the world. We bring deep insight into human behavior, design, and technology to craft experiences that feel intuitive, expressive, and unmistakably Spotify.
   

  

 integrations and device platforms. This is an exciting opportunity to craft adaptive, inclusive experiences that connect millions of listeners to what they love—anywhere, on any platform.
   

  

 You will join a team focused on expanding Spotify’s experience beyond our core apps into partner ecosystems and connected devices. This team works at the intersection of design, external partnerships, and emerging interaction models to bring Spotify to listeners, wherever they are. Together with product managers, engineers, researchers, and content designers, you’ll help shape seamless and adaptive experiences across integrations that reach millions of users globally.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Build thoughtful, accessible experiences across AI assistants, chat interfaces, and connected devices.
* Use AI-assisted tools and in-build prototyping to iterate fast while maintaining design quality and clarity.
* Collaborate with localization teams and regional partners to ensure experiences feel relevant and intuitive.
* Work closely with Content Designers (Prompt / Conversational), User Research, Product, and Engineering to deliver cohesive outcomes.
* Apply and extend Spotify’s build language to new partner contexts while maintaining craft consistency.
* Use research findings to advise decisions and continually improve accessibility and happiness in every experience.


 Who You Are
   

  

* Experience in Product Design experience across platforms, integrations, or global products.
* Competent in scaling partner agnostic foundations into partner surfaces and contexts.
* Skilled in Figma and prototyping tools; eager to explore AI-enabled workflows.
* Collaborative and curious, motivated by working with cross-cultural teams and external partners.
* Comfortable balancing speed, structure, and creativity in a fast-moving environment.
* It's a plus if you have experience crafting for APAC markets or AI-adjacent interfaces (assistants, messaging apps, OEM devices).


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in London or Stockholm.
* We offer the flexibility to work where you work best. Some in-person time helps us connect and create together. This position will require travel across the US, Europe and Asia.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 Spotify transformed music listening forever when we launched in 2008. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators. Everything we do is driven by our love for music and podcasting. Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Product Designer på Klart (vikariat)
description:
Vill du designa en produkt som används av hundratusentals människor varje dag?
   

  

 På Klart hjälper vi över en halv miljon användare dagligen att fatta bättre beslut med hjälp av korrekt och lättillgänglig väderinformation. Vi är ett litet och produktdrivet team som bygger en av Sveriges mest uppskattade vädertjänster – och vi fortsätter att utveckla den.
   

  

 Som en del av Schibsted samarbetar vi nära med varumärken som Aftonbladet och Svenska Dagbladet, och når tillsammans miljontals användare i Norden.
   

  

 Nu söker vi en Product Designer till ett föräldravikariat på ett år, där vi gärna önskar start i juni.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som Product Designer på Klart har du en nyckelroll i teamet och i arbetet med att omvandla användarinsikter och affärsmöjligheter till koncept och visuell design, i linje med vår produktstrategi.
   

  

 Du får arbeta genom hela designprocessen – från research och insikter, workshops och facilitering, koncept och prototyper, användartester och iterationer, till visuell design och optimering av användarupplevelsen.
   

  

 Du spelar därmed en viktig roll i vårt arbete med att arbeta användarcentrerat, och i vår resa att fortsätta utveckla och förbättra framtidens produkt.
   

  

**För att lyckas i rollen tror vi att du**
* Har minst 3-5 års erfarenhet som Product Designer eller UX/UI Designer
* Har arbetat med digitala produkter, gärna native appar och B2C-tjänster
* Är trygg i UX- och UI-processer, prototyping och designsystem
* Har erfarenhet av att jobba nära utvecklare och har förståelse för vad som är tekniskt möjligt
* Arbetar datadrivet med användaren i fokus (research, prototyper, användartester, analys)
* Har erfarenhet i designverktyg som Figma
* Trivs i tvärfunktionella team och agila arbetssätt
* Har en portfolio som visar både UX- och UI-design, samt hur du jobbar/din process
* Kommunicerar obehindrat på svenska och engelska.


**Varför Klart?**
**Impact på riktigt**
 Du jobbar i ett litet team där design påverkar produktbeslut – och där ditt arbete används av hundratusentals människor varje dag.
   

  

**Flexibilitet & balans**
 Hybridarbete (2–3 dagar i veckan från vårt kontor i Stockholm), flexibla arbetstider och 30 dagars semester.
   

  

**Kultur**
 En öppen och nyfiken miljö där experimenterande, lärande och nya idéer uppmuntras..
   

  

 Klart är en del av Schibstedkoncernen, en familj av välkända och ledande digitala varumärken såsom Aftonbladet, TV4, SvD och tv.nu. Rollen ger möjlighet till en plattform att bygga vidare på, där du i din roll arbetar nära andra designers på dessa bolag för att dela erfarenheter och kunskap och skapa nätverk.
   

  

**Är du intresserad?**
 Vi går igenom ansökningar löpande, så skicka gärna in din ansökan så snart som möjligt.
   

  

 Skicka med portfolio eller exempel på tidigare designarbete i din ansökan.
   

  

 Observera: Slutkandidater kommer att genomgå en bakgrundskontroll i enlighet med Schibsteds policy.
   

  

 Har du frågor så är du välkommen att höra gärna av dig till Malin Brinktell, VD, på malin.brinktell@schibsted.com.

title: UI/UX Design Manager (Remote Start → Dubai | AI-Native | $1B DTC Brand)
description:
**Position:** 
 AI-First UI/UX Design Manager
 



**Compensation:** 
 AED 25,000 - AED 35,000 per month + Up to 10% Performance Bonus
 



**Total Annual Package:** 
 Up to AED 480,200 (Tax-Free)
 



**The Reality:** 



* Dubai = 0% personal income tax. Your offer is your take-home.
* In most major markets, 30-50% goes to taxes. Here, 100% of what we offer is what you keep.



**📍 Where you'll work:** 
 Remote to start → Dubai
 



  





 This role starts remote. You'll collaborate daily with our Dubai-based team across Figma, Slack, and standups. When regional conditions stabilize, we'll support your full relocation to Dubai: visa sponsorship, flights, temporary housing, and an annual return flight home.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 We're seeking an innovative AI-First UI/UX Design Manager to join our dynamic team at the forefront of internal innovation.
 



  





 You'll report directly to the CEO and hold ultimate ownership of our e-commerce web design, revolutionizing our design process and customer experience through the integration of artificial intelligence while transforming the design team's creative process through AI-driven workflows.
 



  





**The Career Accelerator** 




 You'll compress 3 years of AI-first design leadership mastery into 1. You'll ship high-fidelity web experiences and conversion experiments in your first year. You'll transform how an entire design team works—implementing AI-powered creative operations that eliminate bottlenecks, cutting design to dev handoff time by 40% while rapidly exploring layouts and variants through Figma AI and Firefly, and mentoring your team through a fundamental technological shift that most design leaders won't navigate for years. This pace energises impatient high-performers. It exhausts clock-watchers. If you get frustrated when you're not learning fast enough, you'll thrive here.
 



  





**What Is In It For You:** 




 This isn't just another design leadership role. This is your chance to become a true industry architect.
 



  





**1. Pioneer the Future of AI-Driven Design** 




 You won't just use AI tools—you'll architect an entirely new design operating system. You'll build prompt libraries, AI-assisted workflows, and quality frameworks that eliminate bottlenecks and cut handoff time by 40%. You'll design for conversational shopping, semantic search, and AI assistants while your peers are still debating whether to adopt Figma AI. This is your sandbox to experiment with bandit allocation, LLM-powered recommendations, and Gen AI content operations at scale. You'll master the balance between AI velocity and human craft that most designers won't understand for years.
 



  





**2. Join the Elite Organization and Partner with the 1%:** 



* 🏆 Top 5 Mattress Brand in US with Over
 **$1 Billion USD** 
 in Sales
* 🌍 Great Place to Work Certified
* 💡 Work with Forbes Council Member CEO
* Gain firsthand exposure to strategic decisions and high-velocity execution that drives a global brand



  





**3. Experience a World-Class Lifestyle** 




 Dubai offers a tax-free income that translates to significantly higher take-home pay compared to most global markets. Enjoy a cosmopolitan environment with world-class infrastructure, year-round sunshine, and a thriving international community of 14+ nationalities. When you relocate, you'll get full support: premium health coverage, annual flights home, and a premium office environment in Dubai Internet City, one of the world's most dynamic business hubs.
 



  





**4. Own the Conversion Engine** 




 You'll have direct P&L impact with clear metrics: add-to-cart conversion lifts, experiment velocity, and design system adoption. You'll present quarterly roadmap reviews directly to the CEO, translating design decisions into business narratives that shape company strategy. This isn't design as decoration—it's design as a revenue driver with full executive visibility and accountability.
 



  





**What You'll Need:** 



* 7–10 years in web design for e-commerce, including 4+ years leading, mentoring, and managing the operations of a design team
* A portfolio that shows shipped PDP/PLP/Checkout improvements tied to clear business metrics
* Expert in Figma (components, variables, Dev Mode); strong visual/motion craft and responsive design sensibility
* Proven experience implementing GenAI tools into a professional design pipeline, with a clear understanding of prompt engineering, quality control, and brand governance
* Familiarity with AI-shaped UX patterns: conversational search, assistant UI, recommendation modules, and their measurement
* Comfort collaborating on experiments (A/B vs multi-armed bandits) with Growth; understands trade-offs between optimization speed and causal certainty
* Working knowledge of WCAG 2.2 and SEO fundamentals for structured content and schema on e-commerce sites



  





**Good-to-Have:** 



* Experience designing chat or guided-selling flows



  





**The Puffy DNA** 




 We're restless, perpetually hungry, and fast-paced, driven by an unwavering belief that we can outperform any competitor — regardless of their size.
 


* **Be the Owner:** 
 We don't hire employees; we welcome owners. You're accountable for results, not activity.
* **Execute with Urgency:** 
 We thrive in high-stakes environments by making thoughtful decisions quickly and acting decisively.
* **Demand Excellence:** 
 We solve the hard problems that others can't, pushing the boundaries of our craft.
* **Be AI-First:** 
 Daily multi-turn AI conversations challenge your assumptions.
* **Go All-In:** 
 When the mission demands it, we rally as one team to cross the finish line.



  





**✨ Your Total Compensation & Benefits** 




  





**💰 Compensation:** 



* Monthly performance bonuses (up to 10%)
* Tax-free income
* Annual return flight allowance to your home country
* Parking allowance (up to AED 7,800 annually)



  





 🏆
 **Rewards & Recognition:** 



* The Leaders Club: Opportunity for selection to an elite lifestyle transforming recognition program featuring premium wellness memberships, exclusive professional networking events, and annual leadership retreats
* 'We Are' Champion: Monthly recognition program with gift vouchers and company-wide celebration for exceptional contributions



  





**🏥 Health & Protection:** 



* Premium worldwide health coverage (AED 1Million limit)
* Life insurance & Personal Accident Insurance (24x monthly salary)



  





**🌴 Time Off:** 



* 22 working days annual leave + UAE public holidays



  





**🌍 Relocation Support (When You Move to Dubai):** 



* UAE work visa sponsorship
* International flights & airport transfers
* 14-day 4-star hotel accommodation



  





**💼 Work Environment:** 



* AI First organization with access to AI-native tool stack
* Premium office environment in Dubai Internet City
* Learning & development opportunities
* International team collaboration (14+ nationalities)



  





**✅ Other Benefits:** 



* End of Service Gratuity per UAE law



  





**Ready to Shape Your Story?** 




 Click "Apply" and take the first step.

* Expert in Figma (components, variables, Dev Mode); strong visual/motion craft and responsive design sensibility
* Proven experience implementing GenAI tools into a professional design pipeline, with a clear understanding of prompt engineering, quality control, and brand governance
* Familiarity with AI-shaped UX patterns: conversational search, assistant UI, recommendation modules, and their measurement
* Comfort collaborating on experiments (A/B vs multi-armed bandits) with Growth; understands trade-offs between optimization speed and causal certainty
* Working knowledge of WCAG 2.2 and SEO fundamentals for structured content and schema on e-commerce sites



  





**Good-to-Have:** 



* Experience designing chat or guided-selling flows



  





**The Puffy DNA** 




 We're restless, perpetually hungry, and fast-paced, driven by an unwavering belief that we can outperform any competitor — regardless of their size.
 


* **Be the Owner:** 
 We don't hire employees; we welcome owners. You're accountable for results, not activity.
* **Execute with Urgency:** 
 We thrive in high-stakes environments by making thoughtful decisions quickly and acting decisively.
* **Demand Excellence:** 
 We solve the hard problems that others can't, pushing the boundaries of our craft.
* **Be AI-First:** 
 Daily multi-turn AI conversations challenge your assumptions.
* **Go All-In:** 
 When the mission demands it, we rally as one team to cross the finish line.



  





**✨ Your Total Compensation & Benefits** 




  





**💰 Compensation:** 



* Monthly performance bonuses (up to 10%)
* Tax-free income
* Annual return flight allowance to your home country
* Parking allowance (up to AED 7,800 annually)



  





 🏆
 **Rewards & Recognition:** 



* The Leaders Club: Opportunity for selection to an elite lifestyle transforming recognition program featuring premium wellness memberships, exclusive professional networking events, and annual leadership retreats
* 'We Are' Champion: Monthly recognition program with gift vouchers and company-wide celebration for exceptional contributions



  





**🏥 Health & Protection:**

* 14-day 4-star hotel accommodation

* International team collaboration (14+ nationalities)

* End of Service Gratuity per UAE law

 Click "Apply" and take the first step.

title: UI/UX Design Manager (Remote Start → Dubai | AI-Native | $1B DTC Brand)
description:
**Position:** 
 AI-First UI/UX Design Manager
 



**Compensation:** 
 AED 25,000 - AED 35,000 per month + Up to 10% Performance Bonus
 



**Total Annual Package:** 
 Up to AED 480,200 (Tax-Free)
 



**The Reality:** 



* Dubai = 0% personal income tax. Your offer is your take-home.
* In most major markets, 30-50% goes to taxes. Here, 100% of what we offer is what you keep.



**📍 Where you'll work:** 
 Remote to start → Dubai
 



  





 This role starts remote. You'll collaborate daily with our Dubai-based team across Figma, Slack, and standups. When regional conditions stabilize, we'll support your full relocation to Dubai: visa sponsorship, flights, temporary housing, and an annual return flight home.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 We're seeking an innovative AI-First UI/UX Design Manager to join our dynamic team at the forefront of internal innovation.
 



  





 You'll report directly to the CEO and hold ultimate ownership of our e-commerce web design, revolutionizing our design process and customer experience through the integration of artificial intelligence while transforming the design team's creative process through AI-driven workflows.
 



  





**The Career Accelerator** 




 You'll compress 3 years of AI-first design leadership mastery into 1. You'll ship high-fidelity web experiences and conversion experiments in your first year. You'll transform how an entire design team works—implementing AI-powered creative operations that eliminate bottlenecks, cutting design to dev handoff time by 40% while rapidly exploring layouts and variants through Figma AI and Firefly, and mentoring your team through a fundamental technological shift that most design leaders won't navigate for years. This pace energises impatient high-performers. It exhausts clock-watchers. If you get frustrated when you're not learning fast enough, you'll thrive here.
 



  





**What Is In It For You:** 




 This isn't just another design leadership role. This is your chance to become a true industry architect.
 



  





**1. Pioneer the Future of AI-Driven Design** 




 You won't just use AI tools—you'll architect an entirely new design operating system. You'll build prompt libraries, AI-assisted workflows, and quality frameworks that eliminate bottlenecks and cut handoff time by 40%. You'll design for conversational shopping, semantic search, and AI assistants while your peers are still debating whether to adopt Figma AI. This is your sandbox to experiment with bandit allocation, LLM-powered recommendations, and Gen AI content operations at scale. You'll master the balance between AI velocity and human craft that most designers won't understand for years.
 



  





**2. Join the Elite Organization and Partner with the 1%:**

 **$1 Billion USD**

* 🌍 Great Place to Work Certified
* 💡 Work with Forbes Council Member CEO

**3. Experience a World-Class Lifestyle** 




 Dubai offers a tax-free income that translates to significantly higher take-home pay compared to most global markets. Enjoy a cosmopolitan environment with world-class infrastructure, year-round sunshine, and a thriving international community of 14+ nationalities. When you relocate, you'll get full support: premium health coverage, annual flights home, and a premium office environment in Dubai Internet City, one of the world's most dynamic business hubs.
 



  





**4. Own the Conversion Engine** 




 You'll have direct P&L impact with clear metrics: add-to-cart conversion lifts, experiment velocity, and design system adoption. You'll present quarterly roadmap reviews directly to the CEO, translating design decisions into business narratives that shape company strategy. This isn't design as decoration—it's design as a revenue driver with full executive visibility and accountability.
 



  





**What You'll Need:**

title: UX Research Manager | Candy Crush Soda Saga
description:
**Craft:**
 UX & UI
   

  

**Job Description:**
 We are seeking a highly experienced UX Research Manager to join the Candy Crush Soda team. This role will be responsible for centralizing UX research efforts, optimizing research operations, and driving a cohesive research strategy that aligns with Soda’s business goals.
   

  

 This is a hybrid leadership role combining team management with hands-on research execution. The successful candidate will actively contribute to research projects while leading the function. The UX Research Manager will manage a team of 3 researchers, prioritize research initiatives, and foster the craft development of the UX Research team.
   

  

**Your Role Within Our Kingdom**
 Key Responsibilities:
   

  

* Hands-on Research Execution: Personally design and conduct end-to-end UX research studies (e.g., usability testing, player interviews, surveys, experiments), particularly on high-impact or complex problem spaces.
* Strategic Leadership: Establish and drive a centralized UX research strategy and roadmap for Candy Crush Soda. Develop clear prioritization frameworks to allocate research resources effectively based on business needs and impact.
* Team Management & Craft Growth: Provide direct line management, career development support, and performance coaching to UX researchers, ensuring a strong research team culture. Foster the development of the UX Research craft by implementing structured learning opportunities, mentorship programs, and best practice sharing.
* Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner closely with game designers, product managers, data scientists, and other stakeholders to ensure research insights drive product innovation.
* Standardization & Best Practices: Define and uphold high-quality research standards, ensuring consistent methodologies, reporting, and impact measurement.
* Communication & Advocacy: Champion user research within the organization, advocating for a player-centric approach to decision-making and product design.


**Skills & Experience**
* Proven track record of leading UX researchers.
* Ability to navigate between strategic thinking and tactical execution, adjusting involvement based on project needs.
* Deep, practical experience conducting UX research across the full lifecycle (discovery through evaluation), not solely overseeing others’ work.
* Demonstrated ability to balance team leadership with hands-on research contribution to inform and guide product.
* Expertise in a wide range of qualitative and quantitative research methodologies.
* Strong ability to collaborate, influence, and drive alignment across multiple teams and stakeholders.
* Excellent communication, leadership, and problem-solving skills.


**About King**
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.

title: Design Engineer
description:
**Build something monumental for Healthcare!**
 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 You care deeply about how products feel. Not just how they work, but how they
 *look, respond, and guide users* 
 . At your previous role, you were probably the person who noticed the small details others missed, the awkward interaction, the unnecessary friction, the moment where the product could have been better.
   

  

 At Tandem, you’ll bring that mindset to healthcare, a space where most software still feels slow, clunky, and frustrating to use. You’ll help us change that!
   

  

 As a Design Engineer, you’ll work closely with designers, product, and other engineers to build experiences that are fast, intuitive, and genuinely enjoyable to use. Your core strength lies in frontend development, crafting high-quality user interfaces - while still being comfortable working across the stack when needed. You’ll take ideas from rough concepts to polished features in production, with a strong sense of ownership over both the technical implementation and the final user experience.
   

  

 This is a role for someone who moves quickly, has strong product taste, and cares about getting the details right - because those details are what make a product feel great.
   

  

 What you will do:
   

  

* Own and ship user-facing features end-to-end, from early concept to polished production experience.
* Work closely with designers to translate ideas into high-quality, interactive UI, and iterate quickly based on feedback.
* Build and maintain fast, responsive, and scalable frontend applications, primarily using modern web technologies.
* Contribute across the stack when needed - integrating APIs, shaping data flows, and ensuring a smooth end-to-end experience.
* Continuously refine and improve the product by identifying friction, inconsistencies, and opportunities for better UX.
* Take ownership of UI quality, performance, and consistency across the product.
* Use the best modern tools (including AI-assisted development) to ship high-quality features quickly.


 What You Bring
   

  

* Strong experience building modern frontend applications with TypeScript and React.
* A clear strength and interest in frontend development - you care deeply about UI, performance, and user experience.
* A sharp eye for design, interaction, and detail, you care about spacing, motion, responsiveness, and polish.
* A product mindset - you think in terms of user outcomes, not just technical tasks.
* Ability to move quickly from idea to implementation, with a high degree of ownership.
* Comfort working across the stack when needed (e.g. APIs, backend integrations).
* Experience shipping production systems and understanding how to balance speed with quality.
* Strong collaboration skills - you enjoy working closely with designers and other engineers.


 Bonus Points
   

  

* Experience in the healthcare industry or with health-related applications.
* Experience working in design-heavy or product-led teams.
* Familiarity with tools like Figma and ability to collaborate closely on design systems.
* Experience building LLM-powered interfaces or AI-driven products.


 Location
   

  

 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of Stockholm where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

 How to Apply
   

  

 We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.
   

  

 Our interview process consists of 4 stages:
   

  

* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition
* Technical interviews with some of our Engineers
* Interview with our CTO & Co-Founder
* Home case and presentation at our office - Join us in the Stockholm office for a lunch and a presentation to experience our our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary & company stock options
* 25 days/year of paid vacation
* Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness allowance (friskvårdsbidrag)
* Social and team-building activities (off-sites, after works, winter/summer parties)
* An opportunity to make a real positive impact in the world of healthcare
* Work with some of the best minds in AI, healthcare, and engineering.


*We review our benefits packages on a regular basis and might modify our benefits from time to time.*
**Culture at Tandem**
 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: Product Manager - Games
description:
Embark is hiring a Product Manager to join THE FINALS, our critically-acclaimed innovative online shooter. As a game maker embedded in the development team, you will help set development and publishing priorities to target improvements in business KPIs. Because a key tool in your toolbox will be quantitative data, close collaboration with data analysts and data scientists will be paramount.
   

  

 You must have great insight into what makes free-to-play games tick, and understand the delicate balance between players, developers, and business needs. You are also highly analytical, and able to balance when to deep dive into the quantitative with when to make judgment calls on what the numbers are
 *actually* 
 saying.
   

  

**Example Of Responsibilities**
* Champion the generation and refinement of live service features and content that target improvements in business KPIs, establishing clear and measurable goals
* Proactively poke and prod at the player journey and product machinery of the game, looking for the best places to improve retention, engagement, and monetization in ways that benefit the player experience
* Perform data analysis to form hypotheses on player behavior to inform product and publishing priorities
* Optimize our content roadmap and monetization strategies
* Work with multiple cross-functional teams across development, live ops, data, and senior management to shepherd the product management perspective from end to end
* Serve as a key customer of the data team, helping define its backlog so more valuable questions can be answered


**We would love if you have**
* 4+ years of experience in live service titles, ideally in the free-to-play space, guiding engagement and monetization content
* Experience working with data analysts/scientists and user research experts, collaborating on the best ways to work with quantitative and qualitative data
* Strong quantitative analysis skills and a history of supporting data-informed decisions
* Familiarity with PvP shooters and the competitive landscape
* The perspective and flexibility to interpret and present imperfect data - sometimes there will be no conclusive data to be had
* The ability to explain complex ideas and motivate teams through mutual understanding
* An organized, detail oriented and self-motivated personality, couched within a pragmatic mindset
* An understanding of player psychology and their motivations, and how this can impact their experience with various features


 At Embark we offer competitive salaries, passionate colleagues to share knowledge with and much more, but most of all we invite you to take part of a journey into the unknown, to build creative, surprising and beautiful experiences together.
   

  

 We welcome game makers of all sex, class, colour, age, gender identity, education, religion, opinion, culture, nation of origin, language, sexual orientation, shape, size, and ability.
   

  

 Did we leave anyone out? Well, we welcome you, too! We think that the gaming industry is made better when everyone has a seat at the table.
   

  

 Be yourself at Embark and make games while doing so. Please apply with confidence. We can’t wait to hear from you (in English)!

title: Founder’s Associate Internship (Finance & Strategy)
description:
**Founder’s Associate Intern (Finance & Strategy)**
**FlavorScale** 
 is seeking a
 **Founder’s Associate Intern** 
 who is data-driven, commercially minded, and ready to help build the business case for the next generation of food discovery. Following a successful pilot in Copenhagen, we are now preparing for a major
 **2026 Q3 funding round** 
 . We need a strategic partner to help refine our investment narrative, manage our financial health, and streamline our path to scale.
   

  

 FlavorScale is the digital home for Gen Z food discovery—moving away from generic trends toward personalized, data-backed recommendations.
   

  

**Your Role as Founder’s Associate**
 You will work directly with the CEO as a strategic co-pilot, focusing on the commercial and operational side of the startup.
   

  

* Fundraising & Investor Relations: Assist in the "re-creation" of our investment pitch. You will manage the Investor Data Room, research Venture Capital/Angel prospects, and maintain our outreach pipeline.
* Financial Modeling & Analysis: Build and maintain pro-forma financial statements, track our burn rate and runway, and create growth forecasts that reflect our expansion plans.
* Market Intelligence: Conduct deep-dives into market sizing (TAM/SAM/SOM), competitor benchmarking, and industry trends to validate our business model.
* KPI Management: Define and monitor core business metrics (CAC, LTV, User Retention) to provide the cold, hard numbers that investors demand.


**Who You Are**
* Background: Currently pursuing a degree in Financial Management, Corporate Finance, Economics, or an MBA.
* Analytical Rigor: You are an expert in Excel/Google Sheets. You don’t just build tables; you build models that tell a story.
* Strategic Thinker: You can translate a creative vision into a structured business plan.
* High Agency: You thrive in an unstructured environment. You spot operational gaps and fix them before being asked.
* Communication: You can draft professional investor updates and persuasive executive summaries.


**Location & Commitment**
* Flexible Remote: Based anywhere in Northwestern Europe, provided your university allows for a Netherlands-based internship.
* Language: Fluent in English.
* Timeline: Joining for 2026 Q2 or Q3.


 If you want to see exactly how a startup is funded and scaled from the inside, this is your seat at the table. Send your CV/LinkedIn and your current favorite food.
   

  

 Interested in FlavorScale but have a different background? We are also open to hearing from ambitious students in
 **UX Research, Growth Marketing, and Community Management** 
 . If you’re passionate about the project, reach out and tell us how you’d contribute.

title: Tech Lead
description:
**Om företaget** 

 Delorean är en digital byrå med stark teamkänsla där du får vara med och påverka både din egen arbetssituation och företaget. Vi tror på att lära oss tillsammans och utvecklas med nya tekniker som kommer. Vi jobbar bland annat med kunder som Liseberg, 7-Eleven, Pressbyrån och Vogue Scandinavia.
 



  




**Om tjänsten** 

 Vi vill nu växla upp med ytterligare en erfaren Tech Lead till vårt team. Idag är vi ett team om 14st utvecklare (och växer), varav tre har en Tech Lead roll hos oss. Vi är ett sammansvetsat gäng som jobbar tight ihop och löser våra utmaningar tillsammans.
 



 Att vara Tech Lead hos Delorean innebär att du är ansvarig för de tekniska bitarna i lösningarna för våra projekt. Vi söker dig som jobbar som Tech Lead idag och har gjort det i några år, alternativt har jobbat som Fullstack-utvecklare
 *minst* 
 5år och vill ta steget upp.
 



  





 Arbetsuppgifterna varierar mycket. Vi jobbar med flera lite större utvecklingsprojekt som ofta har en digital affär. Men vi skapar även kundspecifika verktyg, andra CMS-baserade lösningar, datadrivna prestandaförbättringar med mer.
 



**Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet som Tech Lead i komplexa digitala webblösningar,** 
 du som är lösningsorienterad, logiskt lagd, ser hela bilden och flaggar för vanliga fallgropar likväl som ser möjligheter.
 



  





 Du tar ansvar i hela ledet och är van att sätta upp tekniska arkitekturer, tänka stort. Du är van att göra stora tekniska beslut i projekt och rådge kunder i tekniska frågor. Samt att stötta andra utvecklare i produktion. 
 



  





 Våra uppdrag sträcker sig från avancerade tekniska uppdrag, där olika system och integrationer ska kopplas ihop. Till mindre straight forward uppdrag, där utvecklingen sätts upp och matas ut. Men gemensamt för dessa är att våra Tech Leads tar ansvar från brief till leverans.
 



  





 Du kommer jobba nära våra Projektledare såväl som UX/Design-Lead och självklart leda utvecklarteamet tillsammans med våra andra Tech Leads.
 



  




**Vem är du?** 

 Du har en gedigen erfarenhet som Tech Lead, med
 ***minst 3 års***
 erfarenhet i rollen.
 



 Vi värdesätter en glad personlighet och ett stort intresse för webbutveckling. Ägnar du dessutom en del av din fritid till att förbättra din kompetens och undersöka nya ramverk och tekniker har vi mycket gemensamt.
 



 Vår teknikfilosofi är att använda rätt verktyg till det utmaningen kräver. Därför är vi inte rädda att både testa och utvärdera nya tekniker, samt att implementera dessa i skarpa projekt. Vi undviker att välja verktyg enbart på popularitet eller gammal vana.
 



  





 De flesta av våra projekt är headless i React där det finns en eller flera backends i Node, PHP eller .NET.
 



 Det som är viktigt för oss är att du har flera års erfarnehet som fullstackutvecklare eller Tech lead -  inte att du är fullärd, utan att du är en problemlösare och har ett intresse för att lära dig nya saker. Vi letar efter en teknisk problemlösare som brinner för kod.
 



  




**Din roll i teamet** 
* Ansvara för tekniska beslut i ett projekt där du vägleder både kund och ett team av utvecklare.
* Driva den tekniska delen av förstudier tillsammans med ditt team.
* Ta fram tekniska strategier och koncept med vårt team av utvecklare, UX:are och projektledare.
* Ansvara för och driva olika app-& webbprojekt.
* Även programmera front- och backend.
* Ha kundkontakt och svara på frågor relaterade till projekten.
* Kommunicera i tal och skrift på både svenska och engelska
* Leadansvar för utvecklare på projektnivå.



  




**Vi tror du har mycket god erfarenhet av** 
* Att driva team och kunden genom de tekniska delarna av att app- och/eller webbprojekt.
* +5års erfarenhet från att ha arbetat som Tech Lead/Lead Developer/Solution Architect, alt Fullstack-utvecklare i flera år.
* Backend-programmering, exempelvis något av: .NET, Node.js, PHP, Python, Ruby, Go, C#.
* Att utveckla integrationer och kopplingar till andra system via API:er.
* Pratar och skriver svenska flytande, då detta ett krav från våra kunder.



  




**Extra meriterande** 
* Umbraco, Episerver / Optimizely
* Google Cloud Platform
* Erfarenhet av GraphQL
* SASS/LESS eller liknande-CSS preprocessors.
* Bra koll på Devops-relaterade verktyg och processer, Nginx, Docker, CI-lösningar osv.



  




**Varför ska du jobba på Delorean?** 

 När du jobbar hos oss kan vi bland annat erbjuda följande:
 


* **Vi är kollektivanslutna** 
 - För dig innebär det att du garanteras bra villkor och att saker som betald föräldraledighet, semester, tjänstepension, rätt till löneförhöjning och mycket mer är självklarheter för oss.
* **Du får tjänstepension** 
 - En vacker dag går du i pension. Som kollektivanslutet företag betalar vi in till din tjänstepension från att du fyllt 25 år.
* **Du får friskvårdsbidrag** 
 - Alla som jobbar hos oss ska få de bästa förutsättningarna för att hålla sig friska och krya
* **Kompetensutveckling och delaktighet** 
 - Vi tar fram individuella utvecklingsplaner, erbjuder kompetensutveckling och vidareutbildning. Och vi vill att våra medarbetare är med och påverkar både arbetsplats och hur vi arbetar.



  





 Välkommen att skicka in din ansökan!

title: Senior Backend Engineer | Routing Team
description:
About the Team
  
The Routing Team is the engineering core of Instabee, tasked with solving one of logistics' greatest challenges: the "Traveling Salesman Problem" at scale. We build the systems that plan and optimize thousands of last-mile delivery routes in real time. As a Senior Backend Engineer, you’ll join a high-impact squad of three backend developers, a frontend specialist, and a Staff Engineer. This is a role for an engineer who wants to see their code have an immediate, measurable impact on global distribution costs and delivery accuracy.
  
Technical Environment
  
Our ecosystem is built for high-concurrency and reliability. While we are primarily a Golang shop, we value engineers who can navigate polyglot environments and lead the modernization of existing systems.
  
  

**Languages:** Golang, (Primary), with legacy components in Java and Node.js.
  
  

**️ Data & Storage:** PostgreSQL, MongoDB.
  
  

* ️ Infrastructure: GCP, Kubernetes (Helm), Terraform.


**CI/CD & Observability:** GitHub Actions, Grafana.
  
  

Core Responsibilities
  
You will take full ownership of the backend lifecycle, from initial design and requirement gathering to production delivery. A key part of your mission will be evolving our legacy services into modern, high-performance architectures that ensure long-term scalability. We expect you to write clean, maintainable code that sets the standard for the rest of the engineering organization.
  
Beyond the IDE, you will foster a strong engineering culture through technical mentorship and rigorous code reviews. You’ll act as a strategic partner to Product Managers, refining technical solutions that move the needle on our key KPIs. You will also play a critical role in system resilience, leading incident management and root-cause analysis to ensure our production environment remains world-class.
  
About You
  
We are looking for a seasoned backend engineer with deep expertise in Golang and a track record of scaling distributed systems in the cloud. You should have a sophisticated grasp of Kubernetes, Terraform, and SQL, and feel right at home within a Google Cloud environment.
  
The ideal candidate is a pragmatic architect who knows how to balance technical debt with the speed of business delivery. You are a proactive communicator who is comfortable navigating ambiguity and making firm technical decisions. Above all, you are driven by the intersection of high-level software engineering and physical operations—you want your work to result in real-world efficiency.
  
Culture and Professional Environment
  
We believe the best systems are built by engineers who truly understand the user experience. That’s why we offer the unique opportunity to visit our terminals and join delivery drivers on their routes to see your logic in action. To support your craft, we provide paid licenses for advanced development tools and AI-assisted coding agents, alongside regular "Hack Days" to turn your best ideas into production-ready solutions.
  
We operate with a hybrid work model that blends deep-focus remote work with collaborative office days. We’ve built an inclusive environment where professional growth is fueled by autonomy and constant knowledge exchange. Here, you’ll find a team that values your technical opinion and gives you the space to solve genuinely difficult problems.
  
What you’ll get
  
We can promise you that you will be challenged, develop your skills and have the opportunity to work with truly amazing and competent colleagues. Of course, we have all the necessary and standard benefits in place, but in addition to this, we can also offer:
  
  

**Sky-High Office:** Modern and newly renovated with a 360-degree view around Stockholm.
  
  

**Puppy Friendly:** Bring your dog to work - we've got a whole floor for our furry friends!
  
  

**Wednesdays Tech Breakfasts:** Fuel your midweek with tech talks and tasty bites.
  
  

**Tech Demos:** Dive into the latest innovations with our regular tech showcases.
  
  

**Modern Tech Stack:** Work with cutting-edge technology every day.
  
  

**Fun & Games:** Ping pong, Shuffleboard, Foosball, and even a Karaoke Room for your leisure time.
  
  

**⏰ Flexible Hours:** Hybrid setup with working hours that adapt to your lifestyle.
  
  

**Parental Pay for Six Months:** Step away from work and provide the best care and love to your little one.
  
  

**A Day Off on Your Birthday:** We love to celebrate, so enjoy your birthday to the fullest with a day off each year!
  
  

Diversity and inclusion are very important to us and we are committed to creating an inclusive work environment. We want to be a workplace where everyone’s perspectives and opinions are valued, and we are dedicated to creating opportunities for all employees to thrive and reach their full potential.
  
Our Recruitment Process
  
TA Interview — A first conversation to get to know each other
  
  

Hiring Manager Interview — A deeper dive into your experience and ways of working
  
  

Technical Case — A chance to show us how you think and solve problems
  
  

Grandfather Interview — A conversation with senior leadership
  
  

Reference Check — We'll speak to a couple of people who know your work
  
  

Background Control — A standard check for all hires in Sweden
  
  

Contract Signing — Welcome to Instabee!
  
  

This recruitment process consists of background checks via Verifiera as a review of previous public criminal records. The result is public information that is handled confidentially. This is mandatory for all recruitment processes at Instabee in Sweden.
  
If you're a seasoned backend engineer who wants to see your work make a real-world impact, we encourage you to apply!
  
  

#LI-RR1

title: Åmåls kommun söker IKT-strateg
description:
Vad erbjuder vi
  
Kultur- och utbildningsförvaltningen i Åmål ansvarar för förskola, grundskola, fritidshem, anpassad grundskola och gymnasieskola. De arbetar utifrån ett sociokulturellt förhållningssätt baserat på KASAM och MI, motiverande samtal. Visionen är En skola där alla vill vara och växa i grundad i kommunens vision Ett gott liv idag och imorgon.
  
Kultur- och utbildningsförvaltningen omfattar även en kultursektor med bibliotek, kulturskola, allmän kultur och fritidsgård.
  
Vi söker en IKT-strateg till kultur- och utbildningsförvaltningen. IKT-strategen är direkt underställd förvaltningschefen. I uppdraget ingår att strategiskt driva och samordna förvaltningens övergripande utvecklingsfrågor inom IKT samt stötta förvaltning och verksamheter.
  
Som medarbetare hos oss är du vår viktigaste tillgång. Läs mer om vilka förmåner du får som medarbetare hos Åmåls kommun här: Vårt erbjudande!
  
Ditt uppdrag
  
Som IKT-strateg ansvarar du bland annat för,
  
* Budget inkl. upphandling och avtal i samverkan med controller, upphandlare och IT- och digitaliseringsenheten.
* Samverka med externa intressenter.
* Samverka med IT- och digitaliseringsenheten kring teknisk utveckling och IT-säkerhet.
* Samordnare för övriga IKT-pedagoger, dataombud och webbansvariga samt IKT-grupp.
* I förekommande fall systemansvar.
* Kartlägga behov av kompetensutveckling för personal samt planera för och genomföra utbildningar i samverkan med förvaltning, skolledning samt IT- och digitaliseringsenheten.
* Pedagogisk kompetens inom informations- och kommunikationsteknik.
* Omvärldsbevaka och sprida nyheter inom utbildningsteknologi.
* Ansvara för GDPR-samverkan med Dataskyddsombud och DISA-medarbetare, samt stöd vid GDPR-incidenter. Uppdraget omfattar även rollen som Dataombud.
* Vidare ingår övergripande utredningar, genomförande, uppföljningar och analyser av de statliga och kommunala uppdragen som kultur- och utbildningsförvaltningen förväntas utföra inom IKT och digitalisering inom förskola och skola.


Vem är du
  
Vi söker en ansvarsfull och strukturerad person som kan planera både kort- och långsiktigt. Du har erfarenhet av administrativa IT-system. Du har god servicekänsla, kommunicerar väl, och ger kompetent stöd till chefer och kollegor. Personliga kompetenser värderas högt.
  
Formella kompetenskrav
  
* Högskole-/universitetsutbildning inom skola och utbildning samt adekvat IT-utbildning och teknisk kompetens.
* Erfarenhet av strategiskt och processinriktat arbete inom utbildningssektorn.
* Erfarenhet av pedagogiska utvecklingsprojekt med fokus på digitalisering.
* Goda kunskaper i svenska, både tal och skrift.
* Digital identifikation med Bank ID eller motsvarande.
* B-körkort


Meriterande
  
* Erfarenhet från likanande arbete i kommunal eller annan offentlig verksamhet.
* Erfarenhet av strategiskt och processinriktat arbete inom utbildningssektorn.
* Erfarenhet av arbete tillsammans med lärare/pedagoger, skolledare och övrig personal inom utbildningssektorn.
* Erfarenhet av utvecklingsarbete med fokus på digitalisering.


Anställningen
  
Tillsvidareanställning på 100% med tillträde 12/8 eller enligt överenskommelse. Tjänsten tillsätts under förutsättning att erforderliga beslut fattas. Anställningen kan komma att inledas med en provanställning. Tjänsten som IKT-strateg är direkt underställd förvaltningschef. Uppdraget innebär att strategiskt driva och samordna utvecklingsfrågor inom systemförvaltning, samt bidra med kunskap i det förvaltningsövergripande arbetet. Fokus ligger på kvalitet, effektivitet, samordning och digitalisering av kultur- och utbildningsförvaltningens skolverksamheter. IKT-strateg är för närvarande placerad inom kultur- och utbildningsförvaltningen, som är organiserad direkt under kultur- och utbildningsnämnden.
  
Ansökan
  
Vi vet att en inkluderande arbetsplats är en hållbar arbetsplats. Olika bakgrunder, erfarenheter och egenskaper gör oss sammantaget helt enkelt bättre. Så vem du än är - varmt välkommen med din ansökan i form av personligt brev och cv. För att kvalitetssäkra rekryteringsprocessen, samt möjliggöra god kommunikation med våra sökande ber vi dig skicka in din ansökan digitalt via ansökningsknappen.
  
Övrig information
  
Intervjuer sker fortlöpande under ansökningsperioden, varför du uppmanas att skicka in din ansökan omgående.
  
* var förberedd på att ange referenser vid intervjun (minst 3, max 5)
* var förberedd på att diskutera ditt angivna löneanspråk i samband med intervjun.


**Lön:** Individuell lönesättning tillämpas, var vänlig ange löneanspråk i din ansökan.
  
Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
  
  

(Vi undanbeder oss kontakt med mediesäljare, rekryteringssajter och liknande).

title: Teamcoach/Scrum master
description:
**IT-avdelningen** på Stockholms universitetbestår av ca 120 medarbetare som har ett övergripande ansvar för ett av Sveriges största universitetets IT-miljö. Det innebär bland annat att utveckla/förvalta/driftsätta och övervaka plattformar, system och tjänster som stödjer akademi, utbildning, forskning och förvaltning.


Är du sugen på en spännande och utvecklande möjlighet att vara med och forma två infrastrukturteam som jobbar med applikations- och plattformsdrift?


IT-avdelningen behöver nu förstärkas med en erfaren och driven Teamcoach/Scrum master med syfte att stötta och coacha två av våra infrastrukturteam i sitt agila arbete inom sektionen för IT-kompetens.


Teamet har kommit en bit på väg i sin agila resa men behöver stöttning i att fortsätta att formas och utveckla sin agila kompetens.


Information om oss och vårt uppdrag finns att läsa på:IT-avdelningen.

**Arbetsuppgifter**
-------------------


I din roll som Teamcoach/Scrum master kommer du att coacha teamet med t ex:

* flödesdrivet tänk
* kontinuerligt lärande
* agila principer och mindset.


Annat du behöver coacha teamet i är hur de upprätthåller och faciliterar t ex:

* iterationsplanering
* daglig synk
* demo
* retro
* backlog refinement (som drivs av produktägaren).


Du kommer att ha ett nära samarbete med produktägaren för att driva teamens produktområden framåt samt arbete tillsammans med övriga teamcoacher för att utveckla det agila arbetet vid Stockholms universitet.

**Kvalifikationer**
-------------------


Vi söker dig som har:

* flera års praktisk erfarenhet av scrum ramverket och av att ha jobbat som Teamcoach/Scrum master
* relevant akademisk utbildning tex inom systemvetenskap, IT- infrastruktur eller motsvarande införskaffad på ett sätt som arbetsgivaren bedömer är likvärdig
* goda kunskaper i svenska i både tal och skrift.

*meriterande är:*

* Certifiering som Scrum master.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta inom IT-infrastruktur, gärna i en storskalig IT-miljö.
* Erfarenhet inom förändringsledning.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i annat lärosäte.

*personliga egenskaper:*

* Du brinner för ett agilt arbetssätt och agila metoder.
* Du har en mycket god kommunikativ förmåga i både tal och skrift.
* Du har en mycket god samarbetsförmåga och är flexibel.
* Du är en riktig teamspelare och tar stort eget ansvar för ditt och teamets arbete.


I den här rekryteringen kommer vi att lägga stor vikt vid de personliga egenskaperna.

**Om anställningen**
--------------------


Anställningen gäller tills vidare på heltid med sex månaders provanställning. Stockholms universitet tillämpar individuell lönesättning. Tillträde enligt överenskommelse.

**Vi erbjuder**
---------------


Hos oss får du dynamiken i samspelet mellan högre utbildning och forskning som gör Stockholms universitet till en spännande och kreativ miljö. Du arbetar i en internationell miljö och får förmånliga villkor. Universitetet ligger beläget i Nationalstadsparken med goda förbindelser till city.


Vi erbjuder dig distansarbete, friskvårdstid, friskvårdsbidrag och träningslokaler på arbetsplatsen. Det är en kreativ arbetsplats där kompetens och samarbete är en viktig grund för arbetsglädje och goda resultat.


Stockholms universitet värnar om att vara en arbetsplats som är fri från diskriminering och ger lika rättigheter och möjligheter för alla.

**Kontakt**
-----------


Ytterligare information lämnas av gruppchef Liv Ando, liv.ando@su.se.

**Ansökan**
-----------
