title: Digital Product Marketer
description:
Proposales is the modern proposal and e-signature platform for Groups & Event teams, trusted by more than 1,000 hotels across Europe and beyond.  

  

Hotels use Proposales to respond to incoming requests within minutes, boost conversions to 75 percent and save up to 1,000 hours per year per hotel. Our deep integrations with leading PMS, EMS and CRM platforms, including Oracle OPERA Cloud, Mews, OSEM, Event Temple, Salesforce and SuperOffice*,* are a key part of our competitive advantage  

  

We’re now looking for a **Digital Product Marketer** who can own the marketing strategy while staying hands-on with execution.

##### **Role Overview**


This is a **hybrid strategic and operational marketing role**. You will be responsible for shaping Proposales’ marketing direction while executing initiatives that drive **pipeline, product adoption as well as brand positioning**.


You will work closely with **sales, product and leadership** to develop messaging, campaigns and growth strategies that accelerate customer acquisition.


This role is ideal for someone who has experience in **B2B SaaS marketing and product marketing** and wants to step into a **future CMO track**.

##### **Key Responsibilities**

**Product Marketing & Positioning**  

Own product positioning, messaging and differentiation. Translate features into clear customer value and lead launches of new features and updates. Develop sales enablement materials (pitch decks, demos, battlecards).

**Growth & Demand Generation**  

Plan and execute strategies to drive qualified pipeline. Own and optimize digital channels (website, SEO, paid, LinkedIn, marketing automation) and improve conversion across the full funnel.

**Brand & Content**  

Shape Proposales’ category narrative and thought leadership. Create high-impact content (case studies, blogs, product explainers, sales collateral) and strengthen brand presence in the B2B SaaS space.

**Sales Collaboration**  

Partner closely with sales to improve lead quality, support account-based initiatives, and aligning campaigns with targets.

**Analytics & Optimization**  

Track performance, optimize campaigns and manage key KPIs. Which includes pipeline contribution, CAC, conversion rates and marketing-sourced revenue.

**Marketing Leadership**  

Define the marketing roadmap, manage external partners, in addition to contributing to the long-term strategy and go-to-market direction.

##### **Requirements**

**Experience**

* 2-3 years of experience in **B2B SaaS marketing**
* Strong background in **product marketing or growth marketing**
* Experience working closely with **sales teams**
* Proven ability to drive pipeline and growth

**Skills**

* Strong messaging and positioning skills
* Experience with digital marketing tools (HubSpot, CRM, analytics)
* Ability to translate product features into customer value
* Data-driven mindset
* Excellent communication and storytelling skills

**Bonus**

* Experience in **sales tech / proposal software / revenue tools**
* Experience in **early-stage or scale-up SaaS**
* Experience building marketing functions from scratch

title: Senior Logistics Technician
description:
**Overview**  

As a Microsoft Senior Logistics Technician known internally as a Data Center Inventory & Asset Technician (DIAT), you will prioritize and assign ticketed work to technicians on the team, provide guidance on inbound/outbound logistics tasks, and ensure that inventory balances are accurate. This opportunity will allow you to demonstrate your expertise in standard processes and procedures for Inventory & Asset Management and develop skills around mentorship of peer technicians accelerating your career growth in the process.


Microsoft’s Cloud Operations & Innovation (CO+I) is the engine that powers our cloud services. As a CO+I DIAT, you will perform a key role in delivering the core infrastructure and foundational technologies for Microsoft's online services including Bing, Office 365, Xbox, OneDrive, and the Microsoft Azure platform. As a group, CO+I is focused on the personal and professional development of all employees and offers training and opportunities including Career Rotation Programs, Diversity & Inclusion training and events, and professional certifications.


Our infrastructure is comprised of a large global portfolio of more than 200 Data Centers in 32 countries and millions of servers. Our foundation is built upon and managed by a team of subject matter experts working to support services for more than 1 billion customers and 20 million businesses in over 90 countries worldwide.


With environmental sustainability and optimization at the forefront of our data center design and operations, we continue to grow and evolve as we meet the ever-changing business demands that hold Microsoft as a world-class cloud provider.


Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others, and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.

 **Responsibilities**  

* Prioritize ticketing queues, work to resolve escalations, and clear blocking issues to enable continued delivery of Inventory and Asset Management (IAM) activities.
* Provide task specific guidance to a team of technicians responsible for preparing and executing incoming/outgoing deliveries and documenting inbound/outbound packages (e.g. purchase order [PO] receiving, Rack Movement Supervisor [RMS] activities).
* Coordinate with external stakeholders including third-party warehouses, Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) vendors, and suppliers as necessary to facilitate inbound and outbound deliveries.
* Perform assigned tasks and escalate issues during high-volume work activity or escalation-based situations.
* Leverage process knowledge and technical skills to resolve escalations (or further escalate if needed), clear blocking issues, and may enable on site and/or remote data center support activities.
* Maintain a strong stakeholder focus to improve quality and ensure that the customer receives the highest return on their investment.
* Ensure teams maintain and perform steps required to keep the inventory balance accurate.
* Act as the Subject Matter Expert (SME) about the Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) warranty process ensuring teams process failed vendor hardware devices using tools and processes RMAs.
* Manage schedule of DBD destruction or shredding in partnership with senior leadership and ensure team is following all processes and procedures to perform DBD destruction.
* Attend, conduct, or assist in conducting daily safety briefings, completes required safety training, provides guidance to technicians to facilitate compliance with safety procedures (e.g., Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) usage, rack moving, heavy-equipment usage, lifting, ladder/rolling stair use).
* Seek out opportunities to contribute to workstreams and evolve existing workstream processes, services, and solutions toward greater simplification and automation.
* Embody our culture and values.

  

**Qualifications** **Required Qualifications**

* High School Diploma AND experience warehouse/supply chain in an information technology (IT) environment, inventory management, retail, warehouse management, or a related field OR equivalent experience.
* You may be required to travel between sites as part of this role so a valid driver’s license will be required.

 **Background Check Requirements:**


Ability to meet Microsoft, customer and/or government security screening requirements are required for this role. These requirements include, but are not limited to the following specialized security screenings:

* Microsoft Cloud Background Check: This position will be required to pass the Microsoft Cloud background check upon hire/transfer and every two years thereafter.

  

While not required, we also look for the following**Preferred** **Qualifications:**

* Experience in warehouse/supply chain in an information technology (IT) environment, IT, and/or logistics, operating heavy-load movement equipment (e.g., forklift, pallet jacks, chassis lifts) for a large corporation
	+ OR equivalent experience.

  

  

This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.

  

Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process**.**

title: Customer Success Specialist
description:
Join our team behind the future of B2B advertising!
 



 Want to be part of a fast-growing SaaS company? Do you love building strong customer relationships and helping users get real value from a product? 
 



  





 Then you might be the person we’re looking for. 
 



  





 InZynk is growing, and we’re now looking for a Customer Success Specialist to help our customers get the most out of the InZynk platform. In this role, you’ll be responsible for activating new users, guiding them through onboarding, and ensuring they succeed with the platform over time. 
 



 You’ll work closely with customers through digital meetings, product walkthroughs, and ongoing follow-ups to help them reach their goals. At the same time, you’ll play a key role internally by bringing customer insights back to the team and helping us continuously improve the product and customer experience. 
 



  





 Your mission? Turn new sign-ups into successful, long-term customers. 
 



  





**What You’ll Do** 




 Customer onboarding & activation 
 


* Activate new sign-ups through onboarding emails and follow-ups
* Conduct digital meetings and product walkthroughs
* Help new users quickly understand and start using the platform



  
 



 Customer success & relationship management 
 


* Own and develop relationships with assigned customers
* Proactively follow up to ensure platform adoption and goal achievement
* Support customers in maximizing their use of the InZynk platform
* Drive engagement initiatives that increase usage and success



  
 



 Customer insights & retention 
 


* Act as the voice of the customer internally
* Relay feedback to relevant internal teams (e.g. Product & R&D)
* Contribute to churn prevention and long-term customer satisfaction
* Compile and present monthly customer reports and insights



  
 



**Who You Are** 




 You likely have experience in Customer Success, Customer Experience, Account Management, or similar roles. Experience within SaaS is a big plus. 
 



 But most importantly, you are someone who: 
 



  




* You enjoy building strong customer relationships and creating trust
* Strong written and verbal communication skills in English
* You’re proactive, solution-oriented, and genuinely care about customer success
* Comfortable managing multiple customers, follow-ups, and processes at the same time
* You enjoy collaborating with colleagues across different teams



  
 



**What We Offer** 



* Competitive salary
* A key role in a fast-growing SaaS company
* Opportunities to grow with the company
* An international and entrepreneurial working environment
* A close-knit team that supports each other and enjoys working together



  
 



**About InZynk** 




 InZynk is a SaaS platform that helps B2B companies reach the right companies at the right time. 
 



  





 With our company advertising technology, businesses can target specific companies with relevant messaging, gain insights into website activity, and stay top-of-mind throughout complex B2B buying journeys. 
 



 Our mission is simple: make B2B advertising smarter, more precise, and actually useful. 
 



  





**Ready to join us?** 




 Amazing! We’re reviewing applications continuously, so don’t wait too long. Send us your application and let’s talk. 🚀 
 



 Marcus Lasses - COO
 



 marcus.lasses@inzynk.com

title: DevSecOps Engineer
description:
Join our growing Security Engineering team as a DevSecOps Engineer, where you'll take ownership of security tooling, automation, and infrastructure hardening, not just for the Stillfront Group, but also helping our 20+ game studios across the world. In this role, you won’t just shift left — you’ll sit at the heart of security operations, helping to design, implement, and manage the systems that protect our platforms at scale.
   

  

 This role is to be located in our city center office in Stockholm Sweden.
   

  

**YOUR MISSION**
* Own and Operate Security Tooling: Deploy, configure, and maintain security tools and platforms (e.g. vulnerability scanners, email protection, endpoint protection, SSO, SAST/DAST tools, secrets managers, container security platforms).
* Automate Security Operations: Build automation around security workflows, alert triage, and tool integrations using Python, Bash, Terraform, or similar tools.
* Vulnerability Management: Manage vulnerability detection tools, run or facilitate penetration tests, test impact from real exploits, support remediation workflows, and help teams prioritize risks based on real-world impact.
* Secure the Infrastructure: Collaborate with platform and cloud engineering teams to ensure secure configurations across AWS/GCP/Azure environments, including networking, IAM, logging, and encryption.
* Monitoring and Threat Detection: Support detection engineering efforts by ensuring telemetry from cloud services, containers, and endpoints flows reliably into monitoring platforms.
* Access & Secrets Management: Help design and maintain secure identity and access practices, including secrets management solutions.


**YOUR PROFILE**
* 2–4+ years of experience in a security engineering, DevSecOps, or infrastructure security role, ideally within cloud-native environments.
* Strong knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP), including security services (IAM, KMS, VPC security, CloudTrail, etc.) and best practices for securing workloads.
* Hands-on experience managing security tools
* Strong scripting and automation skills in Python, Bash, or Go to build integrations, automate tasks, and customize tooling.
* Understanding of core security principles, including least privilege, zero trust, defense in depth, and threat modeling.
* Great communication and collaboration skills — you’ll work closely with local engineers as well as game developers at the studios.


**NICE-TO-HAVE QUALIFICATIONS**
* Relevant Certifications such as AWS Certified Security – Specialty, GIAC (e.g., GSEC, GCSA), or more general security certification such as Security+, OSCP or CISSP, etc.
* Contributions to open-source security projects or active participation in the security community (e.g., blog posts, talks, GitHub contributions).
* Experience in threat detection or detection engineering, including writing custom detection rules or working with MITRE ATT&CK framework.
* Ability to assess and prioritize risk, translate technical issues into business impact, and make pragmatic security decisions.


**Stillfront** 
 Stillfront is a global gaming company. We develop a wide range of digital games that attract over 50 million players each month. From well-established franchises like Supremacy, Big Farm, and BitLife to niche games, we span many different genres, including strategy, simulation, RPG and action, and casual and mash-up games.
   

  

 We believe gaming can be a force for good. And we want to create a gaming universe that is digital, affordable, equal, and sustainable. So, we focus on developing games that are all about having a rewarding hobby, a great social experience, or a strategic challenge.
   

  

 Our HQ is in Stockholm, Sweden, but our game development is done by teams and studios all over the world. Our main markets are the US, Japan, MENA, Germany, and the UK. We’re proud that our company shares are listed on the Nasdaq Stockholm.

title: Cyber Security Engineer
description:
**Senior Cloud Security Engineer | IAM | GCP** 




 We are currently looking for a Senior Cloud Security Engineer to strengthen security within a modern, cloud-native platform.
 



  





 This role is ideal for someone passionate about automating security at scale, building secure IAM solutions, and developing programmatic security controls across cloud environments.

**Nice to Have**

 Interested? Apply Now

title: Consulting Field Solutions Architect - Cloud Native
description:
We’re in an unbelievably exciting area of tech and are fundamentally reshaping the data storage industry. Here, you lead with innovative thinking, grow along with us, and join the smartest team in the industry.
 



  





 This type of work—work that changes the world—is what the tech industry was founded on. So, if you're ready to seize the endless opportunities and leave your mark, come join us.
 



 Since our founding,
 **Pure Storage** 
 has empowered innovators to build a better world with data. We’re transforming enterprise storage with simplicity, resilience, and sustainable performance. We’re a team that values learning, collaboration, and customer outcomes. Because we understand the value of bringing your full and best self to work, we offer perks that support balance and growth, including flexible time off, wellness resources, and community engagement.
 



 We also bring unique strengths to customers: a unified AIOps platform with
 **Pure1** 
 , a modern storage consumption model with
 **Evergreen//One** 
 (including industry-first SLAs such as Energy Efficiency and Ransomware Recovery), and proven sustainability and reliability advantages—along with the highest Net Promoter Score in our industry.
 



  





 The
 **Field Solutions Architect (FSA)** 
 is a pivotal technical go-to-market role at the intersection of
 **Cyber Resiliency** 
 ,
 **Unstructured Data** 
 ,
 **AI and Analytics** 
 , and
 **File & Object Storage** 
 . You’ll partner closely with Sales, Solutions, Alliances, Marketing, Engineering, and Enablement to guide strategy, create enablement, and support customers and partners in modern data environments. You’ll help teams qualify, position, and win Data Protection and Cyber Resiliency opportunities—spanning backup, disaster recovery, ransomware recovery, Kubernetes data protection, data mobility, and layered resiliency models—while maintaining deep technical expertise and translating platform capabilities into outcomes.
 



  





**What You’ll Do** 



* Create field-facing solutions content (technical walkthroughs, deep dives, demos, qualification guides, competitive guidance) for Data Protection, Unstructured Data, AI/Analytics, and File & Object Storage use cases, including backup and restore, DR/BC, ransomware/cyber recovery, archival/tiering, hybrid/multi-cloud protection, and large-scale data management.
* Build and launch enablement for early-stage Cyber Resiliency qualification (e.g., playbooks, discovery templates) aligned to specific customer outcomes.
* Develop strategies and patterns for integrating Pure solutions with unstructured data, AI, and analytics platforms; demonstrate value in complex data ecosystems.
* Provide guidance for file and object storage deployment, management, and optimisation best practices.
* Deliver webinars and event presentations (internal and external) with Alliance Partners, Channel Partners, and ecosystem vendors across backup/DR.
* Join customer calls, demos, POCs, EBCs, and strategy/sizing sessions to accelerate pipeline and deal progression.
* Maintain expertise in Pure’s platform portfolio; translate features (e.g., immutable snapshots, replication, rapid restore, container backup, disaster recovery) into concrete enablement plans.
* Stay current on emerging unstructured data, AI/analytics, and file/object innovations; turn insights into actionable field guidance.
* Influence the Solutions roadmap by capturing field feedback on patterns, blockers, and competitive dynamics in partnership with Product Management.
* Lead or oversee field testing of integrations and reference architectures; document best practices to bridge gaps ahead of formal validation.
* Provide post-sales assistance and troubleshooting around backup integrations, snapshot/replication workflows, cyber recovery runbooks, and DR orchestration patterns.
* Partner with Sales Leaders for two-way feedback, elevating regional strategy and execution for Data Protection.
* Drive cross-functional alignment on campaigns, content, and KPIs; connect teams and build strong internal relationships across Pure.



  





**What You’ll Bring** 



* Degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Data/Computer Engineering, or related field—or equivalent practical experience.
* Typically 8+ years of pre-sales experience in IT, with depth in Data Protection (backup/restore, DR, cyber resilience, related architectures). Familiarity with Unstructured Data, AI/Analytics, and File & Object Storage is a plus.
* Typically 5+ years in IT or cloud infrastructure spanning compute, storage, networking, and distributed systems.
* Technical acumen across Data Protection: immutable snapshots, replication, DR runbooks/orchestration, ransomware recovery design, and cloud-based protection patterns.
* Understanding of the infrastructure underpinning high-performance recovery at scale (servers, networking, storage) and how to optimise RPO/RTO across on‑prem and cloud.
* Ability to map customer requirements to architectures and outcomes, and to simplify complex concepts for account teams and partners.
* Strong communication skills and the ability to present and explain visually (e.g., diagramming/whiteboarding) to diverse audiences.
* Proficiency with productivity tools and CRM/opportunity management systems (e.g., Google Workspace, Salesforce).
* Experience with the Data Protection ecosystem and Pure integrations: Veeam, Commvault, Veritas NetBackup, Cohesity, Rubrik, Zerto, VMware, Oracle RMAN, Microsoft SQL Server, SAP HANA, and Kubernetes ecosystems (e.g., Portworx, Kasten) across AWS, Azure, and GCP.
* Experience supporting large Enterprise and Public Sector/SLED accounts.
* Willingness to travel within the assigned territory (and occasionally internationally), approximately 40–60%, with variability by quarter and event cadence; reasonable accommodations considered.
* Reliable follow-through and accountability; community contributions (publications, talks, OSS) are a plus.
* Relevant certifications are a plus (e.g., VMCE, Commvault, AWS/Azure/GCP Architect, Kubernetes/CKA, security/cyber resiliency).



  





**WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT FROM US:** 



* **Innovation** 
 : We celebrate those who think critically, like a challenge, and aspire to be trailblazers.
* **Growth** 
 : We give you the space and support to grow along with us and to contribute to something meaningful. We have been named Fortune's Best Workplaces in Technology™, Fortune's Best Workplaces in the Bay Area™, and certified as a Great Place to Work®!
* **Team** 
 : We build each other up and set aside ego for the greater good.



  





 And because we understand the value of bringing your full and best self to work, we offer a variety of perks to manage a healthy balance, including flexible time off, wellness resources, and company-sponsored team events. Check out
 
 purebenefits.com
 
 for more information.
 



  





**ACCOMMODATIONS AND ACCESSIBILITY:** 




 Candidates with disabilities may request accommodations for all aspects of our hiring process. For more on this, contact us at
 
 TA-Ops@purestorage.com
 
 if you’re invited to an interview.
 



  





**OUR COMMITMENT TO A STRONG AND INCLUSIVE TEAM:** 




 We’re forging a future where everyone finds their rightful place and where every voice matters. Where uniqueness isn’t just accepted but embraced. That’s why we are committed to fostering the growth and development of every person, cultivating a sense of community through our Employee Resource Groups and advocating for inclusive leadership.
 



 Everpure is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, gender expression, transgender status, sexual stereotypes, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or any other characteristic legally protected by the laws of the jurisdiction in which you are being considered for hire.
 



  





**Join us and bring your best.** 




**Bring your bold.** 




**Pure and simple.**

title: Senior teknikspecialist MS365
description:
**Company Description** 




 ARVKonsult AB is a trusted partner in digital transformation, specializing in secure, scalable, and high-performance solutions built on Citrix, Microsoft AVD, Nutanix, and Public Cloud platforms. Strengthened by robust cybersecurity practices, we are committed to creating resilient, user-centric digital workplaces that enhance productivity and enable long-term business success. As an authorized reseller of Nutanix, Rubrik, ControlUp, and Ivanti, we deliver IT consulting services through our team of skilled employees or subcontractors. We seek qualified and experienced professionals who can join us as employees or collaborate with us on client projects as subcontractors to deliver high-quality and valuable services.
 



  





  





**Assignment Description** 




 The assignment involves participating in the development of the technical strategy for our Microsoft 365 solutions, taking into account the existing on-premises infrastructure, which is a hybrid environment consisting of both local and cloud-based Microsoft solutions. We currently operate an on-premises Exchange solution and a custom-developed directory service for access management that is integrated into our environment.
 



 The assignment includes work within the Microsoft 365 workplace area, covering operations, administration, solution design, technical analysis, and advisory services.
 



 The consultant must be available for an interview.
 



  





**Mandatory Requirements** 



* The consultant must have a university degree in a relevant field or equivalent professional experience as assessed by the client.
* The consultant must have at least five (5) years of experience as a senior system administrator within Microsoft 365, including Azure, Entra ID, Power Platform, Teams, OneDrive, SharePoint Online, and Exchange.
* The consultant must have solid experience in designing, evaluating, and documenting technical solutions within Microsoft 365.
* The consultant must have good experience with automation within Microsoft 365.
* The consultant must have practical experience in security administration within Microsoft 365.
* The consultant must have strong knowledge of PowerShell for administration and automation.
* The consultant must have solid experience in technical trend analysis and the ability to translate Microsoft’s roadmap into actionable recommendations.
* The consultant must be able to work both independently and collaboratively within a team.
* The consultant must have experience with pre-studies, analyses, or implementations within Microsoft 365.
* The consultant must have good communication skills.
* The consultant must be proficient in both Swedish and English.


- 


 For each requirement, the proposal must include a justification of how the consultant meets the requirement, preferably with references to completed assignments in the CV.
 



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Experience with custom-developed identity platforms
* Experience in IT operations, management, or development within higher education or the public sector
* Relevant Microsoft certifications
* Experience with agile ways of working
* Ability to verify experience and assignments during an interview



  





**Location :** 

 Stockholm
 




**Remote work :** 

 40% possibility
 




**Start time + option :** 

 2026-08-10 - 2027-06-30
 




**Assignment :** 

 100%
 





 Job Type : subcontractor or Freelancer or Full time.

title: Solution Architect
description:
Dedicated to powering entrepreneurs, Qred is a profitable, fast-growing fintech bank. In just 10 years, we’ve hit 1 billion SEK in revenue and helped create 10,000+ jobs every year. We combine smart tech with real-world experience to make funding simple, fast, and fair. With a flat organization and bold growth plans, we’re now looking for a
 **Solution Architect** 
 to join our next chapter.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Solution Architect at Qred, you’ll be a part of a growing tech organization, supporting our cross-functional teams in our
 **Revenue Domain** 
 and ensuring they can deliver in the best possible way. You will both advise & collaborate with teams on solutions in their discovery phase and own problems yourself, from planning to implementation. Your daily work will probably include the following:
   

  

* Supporting product teams in the Revenue Domain in their ability to build cloud-distributed systems, serverless architectures and container platforms.
* Working with internal and external stakeholders to identify the company's needs and requirements and translate them into technical solutions
* Working across teams on solutions that involve multiple teams and ensuring the solutions we build are in line with our technical vision
* Getting ownership of problems to solve regarding products, architecture, and way of working impacting multiple product teams.
* Participating in setting our technical roadmap to align with business goals and the problems we see in our organization & architecture
* Designing and implementing scalable, reliable, and secure solutions


**Who are we looking for:**
* At least 5 years of hands-on experience in development with NodeJS/TypeScript or Java
* Experience with cloud infrastructure (we use AWS)
* Good grasp of security and compliance standards.
* Familiarity with monitoring and logging tools such as AWS CloudWatch, Grafana or ELK Stack.
* Great communication skills, with the ability to present complex concepts to both technical and non-technical stakeholders. You’re self-driven and thrive on autonomy.


**Why join us?**
 This is a unique opportunity to join a growing fintech company that is redefining financial services for small businesses in Northern Europe. You’ll work with a passionate and innovative team, participating in creating an environment where employees thrive and contribute to a shared vision of success.
   

  

**One last thing**
 This is a full-time, permanent position based in Stockholm. Don’t wait to send in your application, we are reviewing applications on a rolling basis. While the start date is flexible, the right candidate can join us immediately.
   

  

*Qred celebrates diversity and does not discriminate based on ethnicity, religion, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability status, or any other applicable characteristics protected by law.*
 Qred is an international FinTech scale-up that specializes in digital financing solutions for small businesses, with operations in the Nordics, Benelux, Germany and Brazil. We are passionate about helping small businesses thrive and grow, by providing them with business loans and credit cards. Right now we’re in an exciting phase of our journey that focuses on growth through smart product development and technology fueled by international expansion.

title: Solution Engineer - Innovation Hub
description:
**Overview**
**Microsoft Innovation Hub** 
 empowers customers to overcome their business challenges through innovative engagements that integrate multiple areas of expertise. We drive AI transformation by leveraging evolving needs and emerging business opportunities. As the future of technologists and enterprise technical sellers, we guide customers from envisioning solutions to implementation. We deliver the Microsoft value story through immersive experiences, strengthening customer trust through deep engagements in exceptional environments.
   

  

 As a
 **Solution Engineer in the Microsoft Innovation Hub** 
 , you will merge business and technical requirements to craft comprehensive solutions, working seamlessly with various stakeholders. You will conduct discovery sessions to understand customer needs and provide strategic recommendations and best practices tailored to their specific needs. Implementing robust AI transformation solutions and optimizing the integration of various technologies and services will be key aspects of your role. Additionally, you will leverage consultancy skills to foster collaboration among technical resources and stakeholders, ensuring alignment and effective teamwork. This role is Microsoft onsite only.
   

  

 Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others, and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Delivering customer engagements: Prepare and deliver technical engagements including strategy sessions, envisioning workshops, architecture design sessions and rapid prototyping to demonstrate key capabilities, validate against identified risks and finalize technology choices.
* AI Transformation Leadership: Be the trusted voice within the business and for customers on the latest AI platform and technology trends, guiding their transformation journeys. By prioritizing AI use cases through design thinking workshops, you will lead these journeys effectively. You will be a valued contributor to Microsoft’s strategy in your area, ensuring the Hub is proactively aligned with the right customers to drive real impact.
* Strategic Vision and Planning: Own and execute a clear strategic vision for AI transformation initiatives on a set of targeted accounts, aligning with organizational goals and customer needs by collaborating and orchestrating cross-functional teams.
* Solution Design and Architecture: Develop comprehensive solution architectures based on patterns and practices that are tied to customer requirements and ensure that solutions are scalable, secure and optimized for performance. By utilizing consultation skills, you will uncover and prioritize opportunities, ensuing solutions are addressing real customer needs.
* Cross Platform Collaboration: Adopt a holistic approach to integrate capabilities across the entire cloud platform, identifying synergies and optimizing cross-platform integration. You will work with your peers and stakeholders to make the Innovation Hub the home of Cross Solution AI Transformation.
* Technical Depth: Maintain and grow expertise in creating business value on top of the business applications including sales, services and marketing and Microsoft 365 platform to support AI transformation initiatives. Stay updated with the market trends and collaborate with the technical communities.
* Technical Sales and Sales Leadership: Act as a strategic change agent within the business to shape Microsoft's programs and engineering offerings. Lead the creation of scalable, field-relevant assets through internal communities. Champion Hub engagement success by connecting technical capabilities to sales opportunities and serving as a trusted voice with sales leaders and account teams.


**Qualifications**
**Required:**
* Master’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field OR Bachelor’s Degree in a related field OR equivalent hands-on experience.
* Several years of experience in technical pre‑sales, technical consulting, or a similar customer‑facing technical role.
* Fluency in Swedish and English.


**Preferred Qualifications** 
**Design Thinking:** 
 Proven experience delivering design‑thinking workshops, ideation sessions, or problem‑framing engagements.
   

  

* Enterprise Architecture: Proven experience designing and delivering large‑scale, complex solutions that align with business and technical requirements. Ability to integrate multiple technologies and platforms into cohesive, scalable architectures.
* Consultative Selling: Proven ability to advise customers, provide strategic recommendations, and navigate complex technical environments to deliver tailored solutions.
* Strategic & Structured Facilitation: Demonstrated experience capturing requirements, prioritising needs, identifying risks and constraints, and quantifying business value to support strategic outcomes.
* AI Solution Design: Experience designing, building, and deploying AI solutions across cloud and hybrid environments. Strong understanding of AI‑related Azure services, architecture patterns, migrations, and industry standards.
* Relevant Certifications: Certifications in applicable technologies or disciplines (e.g., Azure certifications).Azure Certifications (Preferred):
+ AI‑102 Azure AI Engineer Associate
+ PL‑600 Power Platform Solution Architect Expert
+ Or other relevant certifications from recognised vendors.


 This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.
   

  

 Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process, read more about
 **requesting accommodations.**

title: System Architect – Infrastructure & Tooling Team Lead
description:
**About The Company**
 A specialist in identity, secure transactions, and digital services, IN Groupe is the global leader in secure identity and trust services. Every day, our 4,000 employees across 40 countries work to ensure that everyone has access to a reliable and secure identity, both in the physical and digital worlds. With our solutions and our international network of 10 R&D centers, we support governments and businesses in more than 130 countries.
   

  

 Joining IN Groupe means helping to shape the future of the identity and secure transaction market. Become part of our international teams — driven by innovation and proud to design solutions that make life easier and protect personal data for millions of people around the world.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As
 **System Architect,** 
 you will act as the technical lead for the
 **Infrastructure & Tooling** 
 team in day-to-day operational matters while also owning the architectural direction of our SaaS service platforms.
   

  

 You will work at the intersection of
 **operations and architecture** 
 — ensuring stability and performance today, while designing scalable, secure, and automated platforms for tomorrow.
   

  

 This role requires deep
 **technical expertise,** 
 strong
 **leadership capabilities,** 
 and the ability to balance operational excellence with long-term architectural thinking.
   

  

**Main Responsabilities**
* Act as team lead for operational, day-to-day infrastructure topics and staffing related tasks.
* Define and evolve the architecture of our SaaS service platforms based on the IT OPS guidelines
* Drive infrastructure automation and Infrastructure-as-Code initiatives
* Ensure high availability, scalability, and security across our platforms
* Design and maintain Linux-based environments (primarily RHEL-based distributions)
* Collaborate with development, security, and product teams to align platform capabilities with business needs
* Contribute to continuous improvement of operational processes, reliability, and resilience
* Support strategic decisions regarding infrastructure technologies and roadmap


**About You**
* Very strong proficiency in Ansible and Terraform
* Solid experience with OpenStack (or similar private cloud platforms)
* Advanced knowledge of Linux environments (RHEL-based)
* Strong understanding of:


**Nice-to-Have**
* Server infrastructure
* Storage solutions
* Networking
* Hardware Security Modules (HSMs)
* Experience designing and operating production-grade SaaS infrastructure
* Prior experience managing a team
* Comfortable working in security-sensitive and compliance-driven environments
* Professional proficiency in Swedish and English
* Experience from regulated industries (eID, PKI, digital identity, financial services, public sector)
* Experience with high-availability architectures and geo-redundant designs
* Experience leading or mentoring other engineers


**Personal Qualities**
* A natural technical leader who enjoys guiding others in operational excellence
* Structured and analytical, with strong problem-solving skills
* Comfortable taking ownership of both daily operations and long-term strategy
* Passionate about automation, security, and resilient system design
* A team player who communicates clearly and collaborates across functions


**Background check**
 Transparency, security, and trust are the core of our company; therefore, the final candidate will be subjected to a background check as a mandatory step in the recruitment process.

title: IT Lead – Internal IT & Infrastructure
description:
Blykalla is scaling quickly as we industrialize our Small Modular Reactor (SMR) technology. As our organisation grows, the systems, infrastructure, and security that support our daily work need to grow with us.
   

  

 We are now looking for an IT Lead who will take ownership of how internal IT is structured, operated, and continuously improved across the organisation.
   

  

 Today, we are close to 110 people, with our headquarters in Stockholm and a newly established office in the United States. In this role, you will play a key part in ensuring that our digital workplace, IT infrastructure, and internal systems remain secure, reliable, and scalable as we continue to grow.
   

  

 If you enjoy building structure, improving systems, and enabling teams to work effectively, this could be the role for you.
   

  

**What We Do At Blykalla**
 Blykalla is developing the next generation of nuclear technology with our lead-cooled advanced Small Modular Reactor (SMR). Our goal is to deliver reliable, scalable, and fossil-free energy for industries and societies that need stable power.
   

  

 Our technology is based on decades of research and combines innovative fuel, materials, and reactor design to enable safe and efficient nuclear power generation.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Today, internal IT at Blykalla is handled through a combination of IT support and external vendors. As the company grows, we need to move from a reactive support model to a structured, secure internal IT environment.
   

  

 In this role, you will own and develop Blykalla’s internal IT infrastructure and security, ensuring that our systems, networks, and tools support the company as we scale toward 200+ employees and multiple international offices.
   

  

 You will work closely with teams across the organization and help ensure that our IT environment is secure, reliable, and scalable.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities**
* Own and develop Blykalla’s internal IT environment and infrastructure
* Define and implement IT policies, standards, and best practices
* Strengthen and manage the company’s IT security and cybersecurity practices
* Manage identity and access management across systems and tools
* Oversee internal IT infrastructure, including devices, networks, and systems
* Ensure a scalable IT setup that supports growth and international expansion
* Support and structure the company’s IT support function
* Collaborate with external IT vendors and service providers
* Support onboarding and offboarding processes from a systems perspective
* Help ensure secure and reliable operations across offices in Sweden and the US
* Manage and maintain our Linux-based server infrastructure
* Own the relationship with our external network partner, understand the existing setup, troubleshoot day-to-day issues independently, and engage the vendor for larger changes or incidents
* Manage VPN access, including setup, provisioning, and ongoing administration


**Who you are**
 This role suits someone who enjoys building structure and taking ownership of internal IT environments in a growing organisation.
   

  

 You combine technical understanding with a pragmatic approach to solving problems and improving systems. You enjoy working close to both people and technology and understand how reliable IT infrastructure enables teams to work effectively.
   

  

 You are comfortable taking responsibility for systems and improvements while collaborating across teams to ensure that solutions work in practice. We believe you have:
   

  

* Experience managing internal IT environments in a growing organization
* Strong understanding of IT infrastructure, systems administration, and networking
* Experience working with IT security and cybersecurity practices
* Experience managing identity and access management
* Experience with cloud-based environments and modern SaaS ecosystems
* Ability to structure processes and build scalable systems
* Strong problem-solving skills and a proactive mindset
* Comfort working across technical and non-technical teams


**It’s a Plus If You Also Have**
* Experience scaling IT in a fast-growing company
* Experience working in an international organization
* Experience building IT policies and governance structures
* Experience working with Google Workspace environments
* Experience from tech, deep-tech, or engineering-driven companies


**What We Offer**
* A key role in building the internal IT foundation of a rapidly growing company
* The opportunity to shape how IT and security are structured at Blykalla
* A collaborative and ambitious team working on cutting-edge energy technology
* A workplace where curiosity, responsibility, and collaboration are highly valued
* The chance to contribute to a sustainable energy future


**Location**
 This position is based in Stockholm, and we prefer someone who can work on-site to support our office environment and collaborate closely with teams.
   

  

**So, what do you think?**
 If you’re excited about building scalable IT systems in a fast-growing company working on next-generation nuclear technology, we would love to hear from you. Together, we’re building the systems, infrastructure, and organisation needed to deliver the next generation of nuclear power.
   

  

 We are proud to foster an inclusive workplace free from discrimination. We strongly believe that diversity of experience, perspectives, and background will lead to a better environment for our employees and a better product.
   

  

**We do not accept applications via email.**
 We are not open to external help from recruitment agencies.

title: Partner Development Manager - EMEA North
description:
Snowflake is about empowering enterprises to achieve their full potential — and people too. With a culture that’s all in on impact, innovation, and collaboration, Snowflake is the sweet spot for building big, moving fast, and taking technology — and careers — to the next level.
   

  

 Build the future of the AI Data Cloud. Join the Snowflake team. Our EMEA Partners & Alliances organization is seeking a Partner Development Manager to join our growing team in EMEA North.
   

  

 GSI and RSI Partners offer consulting services, implement Snowflake in customer environments, and refer new prospects to Snowflake. We are looking for a self-driven, go-getter to help these Partners build and scale their Snowflake practice and help us accelerate our partner-led growth.
   

  

 We are seeking a candidate with a proven track record in the data services market, strong communication skills, diplomacy in navigating coopetition and ambiguity, and strong business acumen in growing a sustainable partnership with system integrators and resellers.
   

  

 Reporting to the Regional Partner Director you will have a unique opportunity to work for a disruptive company at the forefront of the Data & AI revolution, and lead the development of a vibrant Partner community.
   

  

**AS A PARTNER DEVELOPMENT MANAGER YOU WILL:**
* Manage a portfolio of Global Systems Integrators (GSI's) and Regional SI’s (RSIs) to achieve partnership goals such as net new customers, annual contract value, and certifications
* Support your partners in their go-to-market activities (business planning, pipeline development, QBR’s, co-marketing, sales enablement, etc.)
* Ensure successful execution of the business plan by developing and managing multiple relationships within the partner
* Work with the partner to expand the partnership into new strategic areas (new workloads, new industry verticals, new service lines)
* Build and manage relationships with key stakeholders (typically Senior Manager / Managing Director level)
* Organize and execute events with and for our partner community
* Pitch value proposition of Snowflake partnership on all levels (up to C-Level)
* Support the field in the process of engaging with partners and leveraging our partner programs


**OUR IDEAL PARTNER DEVELOPMENT MANAGER WILL HAVE:**
* 8+ years of professional experience in Channel Management, SaaS Sales, Consulting, and/or Business Development in Cloud or Software Technology
* Experience in working with SIs to leverage their strategic influence to drive technology sales and their delivery capabilities to drive consumption
* Experience with GSI and SI partners would be an additional benefit
* Proven experience in delivering strong results in pipeline generation and bookings, by leveraging existing and recruiting targeted new partners
* Excellent communication skills, verbal & written in Swedish, Norwegian, Danish & English
* Ability to organize priorities in a dynamic environment
* Bachelor's degree
* Be able to travel between 25% - 50% in some months


**WHY JOIN OUR TEAM AT SNOWFLAKE:**
* Unique opportunity to work on a truly disruptive software product!
* Develop a brand new set of ecosystem alliances for Snowflake making data more accessible to customers
* Develop, lead and execute industry-changing initiatives
* Learn from the best! Join a dedicated, experienced team of professionals


 Snowflake is growing fast, and we’re scaling our team to help enable and accelerate our growth. We are looking for people who share our values, challenge ordinary thinking, and push the pace of innovation while building a future for themselves and Snowflake.
   

  

 How do you want to make your impact?
   

  

 For jobs located in the United States, please visit the job posting on the Snowflake Careers Site for salary and benefits information: careers.snowflake.com

title: Platform Engineers
description:
Arbetsplatsbeskrivning
   

  

 Är du redo för en större uppgift?
   

  

 Polismyndigheten är Sveriges största myndighet med ca 40 000 medarbetare över hela landet. Hos oss får du möjlighet att bidra till Polisens uppdrag – att öka tryggheten och minska brottsligheten i samhället.
   

  

 IT-avdelningens främsta uppgift är att tillhandahålla IT-tjänster till hela Polismyndigheten. IT-avdelningen är en viktig del av det brottsförebyggande och brottsbekämpande arbetet och IT är ett av de viktigaste verktygen för att effektivisera polisen och öka kvaliteten i polisarbetet. IT-avdelningen utvecklar och moderniserar polisens IT och myndigheten satsar mycket på att stärka avdelningen med ny specialistkompetens och den senaste teknologin till nytta för medborgarna och medarbetarna i den polisiära verksamheten.
   

  

 Som statligt anställd på Polismyndigheten erbjuds du attraktiva villkor kring pension, föräldralön, friskvård m.m. Läs mer om våra förmåner här.
   

  

 Arbetsbeskrivning
   

  

 Som Platform engineer på Polismyndigheten är du med och bygger helt nya miljöer, men även underhåller och automatiserar befintliga (on-prem). I dina arbetsuppgifter ingår design och implementering av nya lösningar, konfiguration och felsökning. Samarbete med utvecklingsteam, modern plattformsutveckling, omvärldsbevakning och automatisering är centrala delar i rollen som Platform engineer.
   

  

 Möt Niklas och få en inblick i vardagen som Platform Engineer.
   

  

 Kvalifikationer
   

  

 Detta är en möjlighet för dig som har:
   

  

* Minst två års aktuell arbetslivserfarenhet inom området som arbetsgivaren bedömer relevant för tjänsten
* Relevant eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT-området, alternativt motsvarande förvärvad erfarenhet som Polismyndigheten bedömer som likvärdig
* Mycket god erfarenhet och kompetens av Kubernetes & containerhantering i närtid
* God erfarenhet av Linux-systemadministration
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, tal och skrift


 Denna tjänst kräver svenskt medborgarskap
   

  

**Det är meriterande om du även har:**
* God erfarenhet och kompetens av Ansible, ArgoCD, Bicep, FluxCD, Helm, Kustomize, Terraform eller liknande verktyg.
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD flöden
* Grundläggande förståelse för säkerhet i container- och nätverksmiljöer[FO1]
* Praktisk erfarenhet av skriptning i bash, python eller golang
* Praktisk erfarenhet av versionshanteringssystem, tex. Git


**Personliga egenskaper**
 Vi söker dig som är nyfiken på nya teknologier och vill förbättra utvecklings- och driftprocesser. Du har ett plattforms- och produktperspektiv och tänker på användarupplevelsen. Du delar med dig av dina kunskaper och som enkelt kommunicerar med andra för att nå gemensamma mål. Du är också lösningsfokuserad, ansvarstagande, noggrann, ambitiös och tar egna initiativ. Vi är ett distribuerat och prestigelöst team som arbetar tillsammans mycket och pratar med varandra ofta för att nå bästa lösningar, så du ska tycka om att arbeta i grupp och ha lätt för att samarbeta och vara kommunikativ.
   

  

 Är du sugen på att arbeta i en spännande och modern miljö och är redo att ta stort ansvar, vill arbeta med ständigt lärande och utvecklas kontinuerligt så tycker vi att du ska söka! Vi kommer att lägga mycket stor vikt vid personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 Har du erfarenheten? Vi söker också senior Platform Engineers.
   

  

 Kontaktpersoner
   

  

 Har du frågor om uppdraget är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef på
   

  

 telefon 010-563 68 71.
   

  

 Har du frågor gällande rekryteringsprocessen kontakta ansvarig HR-konsult: Maria Moberg, maria.moberg1@polisen.se.
   

  

 Fackliga företrädare
   

  

 Polisförbundet, Sofia Ask, tfn: 010-563 87 10
   

  

 SACO, saco-s.avdelningarna@polisen.se
   

  

 SEKO Polisen, Karna Tillheden, tfn: 010-561 66 27
   

  

 ST, Jessica Stålenkrans 010-563 32 66
   

  

 Övrig information
   

  

 Anställningsform: Tillsvidareanställning, 6 månaders provanställning
   

  

 Anställningsbenämning: Handläggare
   

  

 Arbetsort: Stockholm eller Göteborg
   

  

 Funktion: Platform Engineer
   

  

 Arbetstid: Flexibel arbetstid, beredskap
   

  

 Tillträde: Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

**Ansökan**
 Ansök genom att bifoga ditt CV (vi vill inte ha något personligt brev) och besvara urvalsfrågorna. Frågorna utgår från kravprofilen för den här rekryteringen och dina svar ligger till grund för det urval som sker i processen. Att besvara frågorna är en förutsättning för att din ansökan ska anses komplett.
   

  

 Urval/intervjuer kan komma att ske löpande. Är du redo för en större uppgift – sök jobbet redan idag!
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan i form av CV och besvarande av urvalsfrågorna via e-post till jobb.na@polisen.se senast den 15e april 2026.**
 Ansökningar till denna befattning kommer endast tas emot via den mailadress som anges i annonsen.
 **Märk din ansökan med referensnummer A150.273/2026 i mailets ärendemening.**
**Besvara följande urvalsfrågor som en del av din ansökan:**
* Har du minst två års aktuell arbetslivserfarenhet inom området som du bedömer relevant för tjänsten? Om ja, beskriv din erfarenhet.
* Har du relevant eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT-området, alternativt motsvarande förvärvad erfarenhet som du bedömer som likvärdig? Om ja, beskriv din erfarenhet.
* Har du mycket god erfarenhet och kompetens av Kubernetes & containerhantering? Om ja, beskriv din erfarenhet och när i tid.
* Har du god erfarenhet av Linux-systemadministration? Om ja, beskriv din erfarenhet.
* Har du mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, tal och skrift? Ja/Nej
* Har du svenskt medborgarskap? Ja/Nej
* Har du god erfarenhet och kompetens av Ansible, ArgoCD, Bicep, FluxCD, Helm, Kustomize, Terraform eller liknande verktyg? Om ja, beskriv din erfarenhet och kompetens.
* Har du erfarenhet av CI/CD flöden? Om ja, beskriv din erfarenhet.
* Har du grundläggande förståelse för säkerhet i container- och nätverksmiljöer? Om ja, beskriv din erfarenhet.
* Har du praktisk erfarenhet av skriptning i bash, python eller golang? Om ja, beskriv vilken erfarenhet.
* Har du praktisk erfarenhet av versionshanteringssystem, tex. Git? Om ja, beskriv din erfarenhet.


 Vänligen notera att krav och eventuella meriter ska vara uppfyllda vid ansökningstillfället.
   

  

 De uppgifter du lämnar i samband med din ansökan kan användas för att kontakta dig, få information och kallelser samt eventuella anställningshandlingar.
   

  

 Urvalstest kan förekomma inom ramen för rekryteringen.
   

  

 Har du skyddade personuppgifter, referenser eller liknande information som du själv bedömer som skyddsvärd rekommenderar vi att du kontaktar ansvarig HR-konsult innan du går vidare med din ansökan. Om du vill komplettera din ansökan vänder du dig till ansvarig HR-konsult.
   

  

 Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) genomförs innan beslut om anställning fattas. Med anställning följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. Läs mer om krigsplacering och säkerhetsprövning under https://polisen.se/krigsplacering och https://polisen.se/sakerhetsprovning
   

  

 Polismyndigheten kommer att behandla dina personuppgifter i enlighet med reglerna i EU:s dataskyddsförordning (2016/679) och annan tillämplig dataskyddsreglering. Läs mer om vår hantering av personuppgifter på https://polisen.se/personuppgifter/rekrytering
   

  

 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

 Vi undanber oss samtal och mail från dig som vill sälja annons- och rekryteringstjänster.

title: Data Engineer
description:
**Oneflow is a rapidly growing tech scale-up located in the heart of Stockholm. We have created a platform that automates the entire contract process from start to finish, all in one place. Turning clunky, static contracts into customer-oriented, digital contracts that feel like magic.** 




  





**Who you are** 




  





 We are building a data-driven culture where insights power every decision, from product strategy to customer experience. As a Data Engineer, you won’t just maintain the pipelines and the data platform, you will also influence data governance decisions, drive data quality initiatives and be a technical partner to the infrastructure team making sure our data platform is secure and up to date regularly. You are someone who is proactive and takes ownership and communicates technical concepts clearly to non-technical stakeholders.
 



  





 If you thrive on solving data problems and want your work to drive measurable business impact this is your stage!
 



  





**What you’ll do** 




  




* Design, build, and optimize scalable data pipelines
* Maintain the data platform and keep all its packages up to date
* Model clean, testable data models in dbt for analytics and business stakeholders
* Partner with business teams to translate business needs into data solutions
* Ensure data quality, governance and security of our data platform



  





**Skills and requirements** 




  




* 3 to 4 years of experience in data engineering
* Strong SQL skills and deep understanding of data modeling (dbt is a great plus)
* Proficiency in Python
* Experience with ETL/ELT tools and orchestration tools (Dagster is a great plus)
* Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS is a great plus)
* Understanding of CI/CD, version control, and DevOps practices
* Familiarity with docker and Kubernetes



  





**Why you’ll love working at Oneflow:** 




  




* Fast-growing tech scale-up with a fantastic culture (eNPS above industry average)
* Work in a team with clear goals and a shared vision
* Wellness allowance, insurance, and pension plan included
* Modern office and fun team activities to keep you connected
* Collaborate with inspiring colleagues in an open, inclusive environment



  





**Come work with us** 




  





 We value gender equality and diversity in organisation, so we strive for a team that reflects the diversity in today’s society. At Oneflow we currently have 34 nationalities and are proud of an extremely diverse workplace. Our recruitment is based on competence.
 



  





 The recruitment process begins with an interview with Aleksandra from Talent Acquisition. Next, you will complete a personality and logic test, followed by an interview with the hiring manager, the assignment, and participation in the case interview.
 



  





*Please note that this position is only open to candidates who already have the right to work in Sweden, as we* 
***cannot provide relocation or visa support***
*at this time.* 




  





**We can’t wait to meet you! 🎉** 




  





 Visit our website for more information about our product and Oneflow. Visit our career page for more information about our culture and future colleagues. 💜
 



  





**One more thing before you hit “Apply”** 




  





 We really want to get to know you and not the AI version of you. No need to overthink it or try to sound a certain way. We care more about your thoughts and who you are. Speak from the heart and we’re listening! 💫

title: Senior Product Manager, ZellisONE
description:
We are hiring for
 **Zellis** 
 , a fast-moving technology company. Zellis and Benifex are sister companies, both operating under in the Zellis group.
 



  





 ZellisONE combines HR, Workforce Management, Pay, Talent and Benefits in one AI-enabled, configurable platform. Trusted to pay more than two million employees every month, we help organisations run payroll at scale, while unifying the full people experience.
 



 Our vision is to be the clear leader in pay, reward, analytics, and people experiences. We're passionate about creating an environment where people want to join, belong to, and be part of a progressive organisation.
 



  





**Why should you apply? 🌟** 



* Your chance to lead the end‑to‑end expansion of ZellisONE into the Swedish payroll & HR technology market
* Shape localisation strategy, product design, and go‑to‑market execution for an entirely new geography
* Become the organisation’s voice of the Swedish customer, influencing senior stakeholders and product strategy
* Work for a profitable, fast‑growing market leader in the HR Technology arena



  





**Please note we are unable to offer visa sponsorship and require to people to be based in Sweden for this position** 




  





**Role Overview 🚀** 




 As our
 **Senior Product Manager** 
 for Sweden, you will lead the localisation, specification, and commercial success of ZellisONE in the Swedish market. You’ll transform customer, market, and regulatory insight into product strategy, define Sweden‑specific capabilities, collaborate closely with engineering and design and be a key voice in the go‑to‑market process.
 



 This is a unique opportunity to build something from the ground up, ensuring our product is market‑fit, compliant, and loved by Swedish users.
 



  





**Responsibilities 🤘** 



* Serve as the internal Swedish market expert, bringing deep insight into HR, payroll, tax, and employment legislation
* Conduct research, interviews and discovery to shape requirements for Swedish‑specific product functionality
* Own the end‑to‑end specification of localised features, writing epics, features and user stories
* Partner with engineering and design to deliver high‑quality, compliant, fit‑for‑purpose solutions
* Drive prioritisation using customer value, commercial impact, and technical constraints
* Shape Sweden’s go‑to‑market strategy, including positioning, messaging and launch readiness
* Support Sales with demos, customer conversations, and RFP responses
* Track post‑launch adoption and commercial performance, refining the product direction
* Build strong stakeholder relationships across Product, Engineering, Compliance, Sales, Marketing and Leadership



  





**What are we looking for? 🔎** 



* Extensive experience in HR Technology, working to improve SaaS products for customers across the Nordic region
* A strong understanding of the Swedish HR, payroll, and employment landscape
* Experience launching products into new European markets
* Excellent communication skills with the ability to simplify complexity
* A proactive problem‑solver who thrives in ambiguity and leads cross‑functional teams effectively
* Fluency in English & Swedish



  





**Our interview process** 




 We understand the need to have a fast and efficient process, the below will all be completed in the shortest time possible.
 



 📞 Initial call with the Talent team
 



 ⏳ Interviews with the hiring manager and key stakeholders
 



 🤩 Final interview with the Zellis CEO
 



  





**We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.** 




  





**We are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace where everyone feels welcome and respected. We believe that diversity and inclusion are essential to our success, and we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer.**

title: Sales Manager - Customer Success (Higher Education, EMEA)
description:
Mentimeter is an engagement tool with a clear goal in mind. To turn presentations into conversations. Through real-time interactivity and clear visualizations, we get people to participate, engage and become more productive. Transforming all those passive meetings, airless classrooms and drawn out trainings into valuable and memorable moments.
   

  

 We truly believe that you achieve the best results by doing things together. And that successful leaders need to adopt a curious and collaborative mindset in order to get there. So with you at Mentimeter, you’ll be a big part of the ambition to help over 1 billion people listen, learn and work better together.
   

  

 At Mentimeter, Higher Education is a strategically important segment and a key driver of our future growth. As we continue to scale in EMEA, we’re now looking for a Sales Manager – Customer Success (Higher Education) to lead and grow our commercial Customer Success organization within this vertical.
   

  

 This role is for an experienced people leader with a strong commercial mindset and a background in Customer Success. You’ll play a key role in shaping how we drive retention, expansion, and customer value in Higher Education—while working closely with customers, data, and cross-functional partners.
   

  

 The team is crossfunctional and have both Customer success managers and Relationship Managers within it.
   

  

**Responsibilities For The Role**
* Lead, coach, and develop a team of Customer Success Managers and Relationship Managers
* Own team performance across retention, expansion, and customer value
* Set clear goals, priorities, and expectations together with your Director and leadership peers
* Drive a strong commercial and sales-oriented mindset within Customer Success
* Lead regular 1:1s, team meetings, and structured performance follow-ups
* Contribute to improving and scaling Customer Success and Higher Education ways of working
* Collaborate closely with Sales, Product, Marketing, and other Customer Success leaders


**Resources we have to support you**
* Close coaching and sparring from your Director and fellow Sales Managers
* Clear expectations, regular feedback, and opportunities for continued leadership growth
* Strong cross-functional collaboration across Sales, Product, and Marketing


**Must haves for the role**
* At least 3 years of experience leading a Customer Success team in a commercial environment
* Experience as a Sales Manager or CS Manager with clear ownership of retention and expansion
* Strong track record of working with goals, KPIs, and performance management
* Solid commercial mindset and experience driving growth through existing customers
* High ownership, structured leadership approach, and ability to scale ways of working


**Nice to have**
* Experience working with Education / Higher Education customers
* Experience from a scaling SaaS or subscription-based business


**Please note:** 
 This position is located onsite at our office in Stockholm, with a flexible start date, ideally as soon as possible.
   

  

**What Mentimeter Can Offer**
 At Mentimeter we can offer a diverse and inclusive work environment supported by smart and driven colleagues. We believe in continuous professional development for all of our colleagues and therefore offer access to a leadership program (including external personal coach) and relevant education to ensure that we continue to be state-of-the-art when it comes to innovating and building Mentimeter. Your place will be in a growing company with lots of career opportunities, working on a beloved product used by more than 300 million people. It’s not all about work though, we also offer a very healthy view on work-life balance.
   

  

 All of this comes attached with a competitive compensation and benefits package, including pension contributions. Learn more about our benefits by visiting our Benefits & Perks page
   

  

**AI and Hiring at Mentimeter**
 At Mentimeter, we believe AI helps us work smarter - but it never replaces the human assessment, curiosity, and personal connection that define our culture and our hiring. We use AI as a sparring partner: to bounce ideas, bring new perspectives, support structure, and make our work more efficient. But the meaning, decisions, and interactions always come from people.
   

  

* AI does not screen or decide on candidates.
* There is no automated filtering, ranking, or decision-making in our recruitment process. Every application is reviewed by a person.
* Hiring teams may use AI to support their work - for example, to structure notes, prepare interview questions, or organize their thinking.


 AI strengthens our work, but it does not define it. At Mentimeter, we’re not building an AI-driven hiring process - we’re building a people-first culture, where technology helps us listen, learn, and grow together.
   

  

**Culture at Mentimeter**
 At Mentimeter we believe in giving everyone a voice - regardless of who you are. So we build a platform that does just that. Our platform is not only our product but also our organization. A platform where people feel safe, where differences are embraced, a place where you can have fun. We strongly encourage applicants who are people of color, LGBTQ+, women, people with disabilities, and/or formerly incarcerated people, and a college degree is not strictly required. In order to give everyone a voice, we need to be as diverse as our users.
   

  

 Learn more about our culture by visiting our Culture page.
   

  

 Review our Privacy Policy for more information.

title: FOREX söker Head of Business IT & Digital Development
description:
**Vill du driva digital utveckling i Nordens ledande resevalutakedja?**
 Vi söker en erfaren och framåtblickande
 **Head of Business IT & Digital Development** 
 som vill driva affärsdriven IT-utveckling för att möjliggöra tillväxt och effektivitet i affären och vara med i att forma framtidens FOREX – i butik, online och i våra egna system.
   

  

 Som
 **Head of Business IT & Digital Development** 
 har du ansvar för att driva IT utveckling, både med interna resurser och externa leverantörer, för att möjliggöra tillväxt och effektivitet i affären. Rollen kombinerar strategiskt ledarskap med operativt ansvar för våra affärskritiska system – från resevalutahantering och butikslösningar till våra e-handelskanaler, integrationer och interna processer.
   

  

 Du leder och arbetar nära ett team av specialister och utvecklare, driver verksamhetsnära utveckling och säkerställer stabila, säkra och skalbara lösningar i en regulatorisk miljö. Rollen är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid med placering i våra nya lokaler på Fleminggatan, bara några minuters promenad från Centralstationen. Du rapporterar till CDO.
   

  

**Dina huvudsakliga ansvarsområden**
* Utveckla framtidens digitala kundupplevelse både i butik, på digitala kanaler och genom självbetjäningstjänster.
* Driva kontinuelig förbättring med ändåmålsenlig Business IT- och dataarkitektur samt roadmap.
* Leda och vidareutveckla FOREX Business IT och digitala utvecklingsteam med tydlig fokus på affärsutveckling, effektiva IT lösningar och nyttjande av moderna arbetssätt och teknologier inklusive AI stöd.
* Driva modernisering av systemstöd och automatisering av affärsprocesser på tvären av organisationen i nära samarbete med olika funktioner.
* Styr och samordna leverantörer, partners och interna prioriteringar samt större implementationsprojekt.
* Säkerställa att de lösningar som utvecklas internt och genom externa partners uppfyller finansiella och regulatoriska krav (t.ex. PSD2, DORA, AML, PCI, risk och säkerhet).
* Budget-, resurs- och riskansvar inom Business IT.


**Vi tror att du är**
* En trygg och engagerande ledare med erfarenhet av komplexa IT-miljöer – gärna inom finans, retail eller annan transaktionsintensiv verksamhet
* Strategisk och samtidigt hands‑on när det behövs. Du växlar mellan vision och leverans
* Van att driva digitalisering som skapar konkret affärsnytta, effektivitet och bättre kundupplevelser
* Strukturerad, relationsbyggande och bra på att samarbeta med verksamhetschefer och externa parter
* Har erfarenhet av att leda DevOps utveckling i Azure miljöer med API intergrationer (REST/SOAP) samt utveckling i .NET (C#) och React Native
* Lika intresserad av cybersäkerhet och stabilitet som av innovation och nya möjligheter.


**Kvalifikationer**
* Mångårig erfarenhet i en ledande IT‑ eller digitalutvecklingsroll.
* Erfarenhet av förändrings- och moderniseringsarbete i tekniska plattformar.
* God förståelse för IT-arkitektur, integrationer, data och IT-säkerhet.
* Erfarenhet från regulatoriska miljöer är starkt meriterande.
* Erfarenhet av att leda team, budget och leverantörer.
* Mycket god kommunikationsförmåga på svenska och engelska.


**Vi erbjuder**
* En central roll i att bygga FOREX digitala framtid och stärka kundresan i alla kanaler.
* Stor möjlighet att påverka en verksamhet i en förändringsresa.
* Ett engagerat och kunnigt team samt nära samarbete med ledning och verksamhet.
* En värderingsdriven kultur med fokus på kundnytta, ansvar och enkelhet.


 Låter det som något för dig? Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

**Om ansökan**
 Av säkerhetsskäl kommer vi att ta en kreditupplysning samt be om ett utdrag ur belastningsregistret innan anställning kan ske.
   

  

 Vid frågor till fackliga företrädare, Unionen, kontakta unionen@forex.se
   

  

**Inkom med din ansökan senast 31 mars 2026. Urvalet sker löpande och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag har passerat.**
 FOREX är ett familjeägt företag som sedan 1965 är Nordens marknadsledare på resevaluta. Vi erbjuder dig även reseförsäkringar, kreditkort och att skicka pengar utomlands. Våra butiker finns på centralt belägna platser i Sverige, Norge, Finland och Danmark.

title: Senior Technical Support Engineer
description:
As a Senior Technical Support Engineer, you’ll part of and work closely with the TAC team to deliver high quality technical solutions, solve complex challenges, and support long term adoption of the platform for our customers.
 



  





**Introduction** 




 Smartoptics is a Scandinavian company founded in 2006. We provide innovative optical networking solutions and devices for the new era of open networking. We focus on solving network challenges and increasing the competitiveness of our customers. Our customer base includes thousands of enterprises, governments, cloud providers, Internet exchanges as well as cable and telecom operators. Our solutions are based on open-networking standards and are used in metro and regional network applications that increasingly rely on data center services and specifications. The products we deliver are based on in-house developed hardware and software and enhanced through associated services.
 



 We take pride in being responsive, trustworthy, and innovative.
 



  





**The Role** 




 You’ll be part of a growing, collaborative team where knowledge sharing, and teamwork are core values. As a Senior Technical Support Engineer, you’ll be part of and work closely with the TAC team to deliver high quality technical solutions, solve complex challenges, and support long term adoption of the platform for our customers. You’ll act as a key technical contact throughout trouble shooting sessions and resolution finding.
 



 To become an expert on Smartoptics solutions we offer extensive training to get a deep knowledge of all aspects of Smartoptics product portfolio, including hardware, software & optical designs.
 



 This position also includes handling Level 2 and Level 3 support, carrying out deeper investigations, troubleshooting advanced issues, and keeping internal documentation accurate and up to date.
 



  





**What You'll Do** 



* Support the TAC team with technical expertise and mentorship
* Manage Level 2 & 3 escalations, ensuring thorough investigation and resolution
* Document findings, system updates, and configuration changes
* Understand customer requirements and design tailored technical solutions
* Create reports and compile root cause analysis together with R&D
* Deliver internal training through calls, workshops, and demos
